flavorText: Draenei are so dedicated that they remain vigilant even in death.

name: Astrobiologist
text: Battlecry: At the start of your next turn, Discover a spell.
flavorText: Biologists spend a semester abroad. Astrobiologists spend a semester aboard.

name: Astromancer
text: Battlecry: Summon a random minion with Cost equal to your hand size.
flavorText: All signs point to Antonidas.

name: Astromancer
text: Battlecry: Summon a random minion with Cost equal to your hand size.
flavorText: All signs point to Antonidas.

name: Astromancer Solarian
text: Spell Damage +1 Deathrattle: Shuffle 'Solarian Prime' into your deck.
flavorText: Loyal to Kael'thas Sunstrider, this blood elf mage sought arcane power in the Void. Did she find it... or did IT find her?

name: Asvedon, the Grandshield
text: Taunt Battlecry: Cast a copy of the last spell your opponent played.
flavorText: If you think that's strong, you should see his Great Great Grandshield.

name: Athletic Studies
text: Discover a Rush minion. Your next one costs (1) less.
flavorText: It's a quick read.

name: Atlasaurus
text: Taunt. Deathrattle: Summon a random Taunt minion that costs (5) or more.
flavorText: He's got the weight of the world on his shoulders.

name: Attorney-at-Maw
text: Choose One - Silence a minion; or Give a minion Immune this turn.
flavorText: When the going gets tough, you don't want a criminal lawyer... you want a criminal lawyer...

name: Auchenai Death-Speaker
text: After another friendly minion is Reborn, summon a copy of it.
flavorText: He sees no evil. He hears no evil. Eh, he speaks a little evil.

name: Auchenai Phantasm
text: Battlecry: This turn, your healing effects deal damage instead.
flavorText: “Okay kids did everyone remember to heal before we left?”

name: Auchenai Soulpriest
text: Your cards and powers that restore Health now deal damage instead.
flavorText: The Auchenai know the end is coming, but they're not sure when.

name: Auctioneer Jaxon
text: Whenever you Trade, Discover a card from your deck to draw instead.
flavorText: "Who's up for a brand-new wisp? This thing's in perfect condition, folks! Never been played..."

name: Auctionhouse Gavel
text: After your hero attacks, reduce the Cost of a Battlecry minion in your hand by (1).
flavorText: "I want to be a judge! Or an auctioneer! Look, all I want is one of those sweet, tiny hammers."

name: Auctionmaster Beardo
text: After you cast a spell, refresh your Hero Power.
flavorText: Gadgetzan has always run an under-the-table auction house, and business has been PRETTY good for Beardo since the population explosion. And since the explosion that destroyed the competing auction houses in the city.

name: Audio Amplifier
text: Battlecry: Set your maximum Mana and hand size to 11.
flavorText: And you thought we were putting Wildheart Guff in Core. We'd never do that! WINK WINK.

name: Audio Medic
text: Rush Finale: Gain Lifesteal.
flavorText: His performance isn't over, watch!

name: Audio Splitter
text: Deathrattle: Copy the highest Cost spell in your hand.
flavorText: "I tried to give him some constructive criticism but gosh, he really hates feedback!"

name: Augmented Elekk
text: Whenever you shuffle a card into a deck, shuffle in an extra copy.
flavorText: Her friends call her "Shuffleupugus".

name: Augmented Porcupine
text: Deathrattle: Deal this minion's Attack damage randomly split among all enemies.
flavorText: Pokey-man. Gotta spike 'em all!

name: Augmented Porcupine
text: Deathrattle: Deal this minion's Attack damage randomly split among all enemies.
flavorText: Pokey-man. Gotta spike 'em all!

name: Auspicious Spirits
text: Summon a random 4-Cost minion. Corrupt: Summon a 7-Cost minion instead.
flavorText: "I'm not AWE-spicious, but I am a little spicious."

name: Autodefense Matrix
text: Secret: When one of your minions is attacked, give it Divine Shield.
flavorText: We call it the bubble machine.

name: Avalanche
text: Freeze a minion and deal 3 damage to adjacent ones.
flavorText: One of our more snowbally cards.

name: Avant-Gardening
text: Discover a Deathrattle minion with a Dark Gift.
flavorText: Normal gardening is so passé.

name: Avatar of Destruction
text: Taunt Deathrattle: Deal 9 damage to all enemy minions.
flavorText: Master of all ONE element!

name: Avatar of Hearthstone
text: Battlecry: Open a Standard Pack. Play all cards from it.
flavorText: Now introducing -- Hearthstone Portable!

name: Avatar of Hearthstone
text: Battlecry: Open a Standard Pack. Play all cards from it.
flavorText: Now introducing -- Hearthstone Portable!

name: Avenge
text: Secret: When one of your minions dies, give a random friendly minion +3/+2.
flavorText: Several paladins have joined together to deliver justice under the name "Justice Force". Their lawyer talked them out of calling themselves the Justice League.

name: Avenging Wrath
text: Deal 8 damage randomly split among all enemies.
flavorText: Wham! Wham! Wham! Wham! Wham! Wham! Wham! Wham!

name: Avian Watcher
text: Battlecry: If you control a Secret, gain +1/+1 and Taunt.
flavorText: He mostly watches light romantic comedies.

name: Aviana
text: Your minions cost (1).
flavorText: Call her "Tweety". She'll find it real funny. I PROMISE.

name: Aviana
text: Your minions cost (1).
flavorText: Call her "Tweety". She'll find it real funny. I PROMISE.

name: Aviana, Elune's Chosen
text: Battlecry: Start a three turn lunar cycle. When the Full Moon rises, your cards cost (1) this game.
flavorText: The Mistress of Birds takes a special interest in all creatures of the sky, as well as those who have wings but have yet to fly.

name: Awaken the Makers
text: Quest: Summon 6 Deathrattle minions. Reward: Amara, Warden of Hope.
flavorText: They keep hitting the Snooze button.

name: Awaken!
text: Invoke Galakrond. Deal 1 damage to all minions.
flavorText: This is an alarm clock you can't ignore.

name: Awakening Tremors
text: Get three 4/1 Worms. They cost (1).
flavorText: A rude followup to the Sleepy Tremors.

name: Axe Berserker
text: Rush. Honorable Kill: Draw a weapon.
flavorText: All the body spray went to her head.

name: Axe Flinger
text: Whenever this minion takes damage, deal 2 damage to the enemy hero.
flavorText: Once a lowly "Stick Flinger", he's been relentless on the path to his ultimate dream: "Tauren Flinger".

name: Axe Flinger
text: Whenever this minion takes damage, deal 2 damage to the enemy hero.
flavorText: Once a lowly "Stick Flinger", he's been relentless on the path to his ultimate dream: "Tauren Flinger".

name: Axe of the Forefathers
text: After your hero attacks, deal 1 damage to all minions.
flavorText: ...and the axe of the beforefathers before the forefathers before him.

name: Aya Blackpaw
text: Battlecry and Deathrattle: Summon a Jade Golem.
flavorText: Though young, Aya took over as the leader of Jade Lotus through her charisma and strategic acumen when her predecessor was accidentally crushed by a jade golem.

name: Aya Blackpaw
text: Battlecry and Deathrattle: Summon a Jade Golem. Battlecry and Deathrattle: Summon a Jade Golem.
flavorText: Though young, Aya took over as the leader of Jade Lotus through her charisma and strategic acumen when her predecessor was accidentally crushed by a jade golem.

name: Aya, Lotus Kingpin
text: You always go second. Battlecry: Pick an upgraded counterfeit to replace your Coins this game. Get two.
flavorText: If there's one thing the leader of the Jade Lotus learned back in Gadgetzan, it’s that there is no honor among thieves. And yet here she finds herself again - working with backstabbers no better than Kazakus.

name: Azalina Soulsever
text: Your deck is 20 cards, plus 20 copied from your enemy. Battlecry: Draw until your hand is full.
flavorText: The vengeful spirit’s reign of terror in the Witchwood has come to an end. But more and more of Azalina’s whispers have been escaping her cage. How many guards are under her spell? Only one thing is certain: any deal Vanessa strikes with her will come at a cost...

name: Azalina Soulthief
text: Battlecry: Replace your hand with a copy of your opponent's.
flavorText: The cards are always golden on the other side.

name: Azerite Chain Gang
text: Taunt Battlecry and Quickdraw: Summon a copy of this.
flavorText: How long can this go on? For 6 years at least!

name: Azerite Elemental
text: At the start of your turn, gain Spell Damage +2.
flavorText: This is some bad blood.

name: Azerite Giant
text: Costs (1) less for each turn in a row you've played an Elemental.
flavorText: Either that giant isn't really giant, or that doorway is HUGE!

name: Azerite Vein
text: Secret: When the enemy plays a card on the turn that it entered their hand, get a copy that costs (0).
flavorText: When the ground trembles near it, are those earthquakes or heartbeats?

name: Azshara's Triumph
text: Shuffle 5 random minions into your deck that cost (8) or more. Double their stats.
flavorText: Just when she thought victory was in reach, the Ocean Lord found herself facing a foe she never thought to prepare for – the hero she could have become if she cared more for her people.

name: Azshara, Ocean Lord
text: Colossal +2 Your hero has Windfury.
flavorText: Azshara has never been one to acknowledge any higher power than herself – not even Deathwing. But she's not averse to making deals.

name: Azsharan Defector
text: Rush. Deathrattle: Put a 'Sunken Defector' on the bottom of your deck.
flavorText: "I've got a sinking feeling about this evil Queen."

name: Azsharan Gardens
text: Give all minions in your hand +1/+1. Put a 'Sunken Gardens' on the bottom of your deck.
flavorText: That's not what I meant when I asked you to water the garden.

name: Azsharan Mooncatcher
text: Divine Shield. Battlecry: Put a 'Sunken Mooncatcher' on the bottom of your deck.
flavorText: The light of Elune faded from the ruins of Zin-Azshari, but not its treasures.

name: Azsharan Ritual
text: Silence a minion and summon a copy of it. Put a 'Sunken Ritual' on the bottom of your deck.
flavorText: The harmonious silence surrounding the ritual was unceremoniously BROKEN when HAROLD began eating stale potato chips.

name: Azsharan Saber
text: Rush. Deathrattle: Put a 'Sunken Saber' on the bottom of your deck.
flavorText: Even in ancient times, the Night Elves were committed cat people.

name: Azsharan Scavenger
text: Battlecry: Put a 'Sunken Scavenger' on the bottom of your deck.
flavorText: Some local Murloc populations have adapted to survive in the harsh conditions of the ruins, much to the fascination of Sir Finley.

name: Azsharan Scroll
text: Discover a Fire, Frost or Nature spell. Put a 'Sunken Scroll' on the bottom of your deck.
flavorText: Kids these days are always scrolling on their tomes.

name: Azsharan Sentinel
text: Taunt. Deathrattle: Put a 'Sunken Sentinel' on the bottom of your deck.
flavorText: For some, the Sundering was the collapse of civilization. For others, it was a great core workout.

name: Azsharan Sweeper
text: Battlecry: Put a 'Sunken Sweeper' on the bottom of your deck.
flavorText: The enchanted objects of Zin-Azshari have extremely long warranties.

name: Azsharan Trident
text: Deathrattle: Put a 'Sunken Trident' on the bottom of your deck.
flavorText: Nevermind the barnacles! A well-crafted weapon is eternally useful.

name: Azsharan Vessel
text: Summon two 3/3 Pirates with Stealth. Put a 'Sunken Vessel' on the bottom of your deck.
flavorText: Not even the sturdiest Highborne ship could survive the churning waters of the Sundering.

name: Azure Drake
text: Spell Damage +1 Battlecry: Draw a card.
flavorText: They initially planned to be the Beryl or Cerulean drakes, but those felt a tad too pretentious.

name: Azure Explorer
text: Spell Damage +2 Battlecry: Discover a Dragon.
flavorText: Has an appetite for knowledge!

name: Azure Queen Sindragosa
text: Fabled If you control another Dragon, your Arcane spells cost (2) less.
flavorText: Once Malygos' beloved mate, Sindragosa was among the first to suspect the corruption that had overtaken Neltharion. She came to regret not trusting her suspicions.

name: BEEEES!!!
text: Choose a minion. Summon four 1/1 Bees that attack it.
flavorText: Right before CEEEES!!!

name: Baba Naga
text: Battlecry: If you've cast a spell while holding this, deal 3 damage.
flavorText: A folktale told to Naga children to scare them from swimming too close to the surface.

name: Babbling Book
text: Battlecry: Add a random Mage spell to your hand.
flavorText: His idol is the Green Hills of Stranglethorn, and he won't shut up about it.

name: Babbling Bookcase
text: Battlecry: Add 2 random Mage spells to your hand.
flavorText: Babbling Bookcase is quickly becoming one of my favorite cards. It's just so positive and generous. Practically costs nothing at all at three mana you drop him on the board and that chill guy gives you two spells to use later in the game.

name: Backfire
text: Draw 3 cards. Deal 3 damage to your hero.
flavorText: "That's the last time I let an imp spit gasoline into my car."

name: Backroom Bouncer
text: Whenever a friendly minion dies, gain +1 Attack.
flavorText: "WHY ARE YOU IN THE BACK ROOM? WHO IS WATCHING THE FRONT?!"

name: Backstab
text: Deal 2 damage to an undamaged minion.
flavorText: It's funny how often yelling "Look over there!" gets your opponent to turn around.

name: Backstab
text: Deal 2 damage to an undamaged minion.
flavorText: It's funny how often yelling "Look over there!" gets your opponent to turn around.

name: Backstage Bouncer
text: Taunt Battlecry: Transform a friendly minion into a copy of this.
flavorText: Doesn't see your name on the list. Also doesn't know how to read the names on the list.

name: Backstreet Leper
text: Deathrattle: Deal 2 damage to the enemy hero.
flavorText: Quit playing games with his heart. And his fingers. And foot. It's rude.

name: Bad Luck Albatross
text: Deathrattle: Shuffle two 1/1 Albatross into your opponent's deck.
flavorText: Legend holds that it's bad luck to harm it. So maybe just pat it on the head, okay?

name: Bad Omen
text: In 2 turns, summon two 6/6 Demons with Taunt. If you're building a Starship, summon them now.
flavorText: What good is a sign from alien life if I CAN'T EVEN READ IT?!

name: Badlands Brawler
text: Battlecry: Start a Brawl! If you've Excavated twice, this always wins.
flavorText: Watch out watch out watch out - R.K.O. outta nowhere!

name: Bait and Switch
text: Secret: When a friendly minion is attacked, give it +3/+3.
flavorText: Oh my god, the bait and switch works every time!

name: Baited Arrow
text: Deal 3 damage. Overkill: Summon a 5/5 Devilsaur.
flavorText: The card is common, but the steak is rare.

name: Baking Soda Volcano
text: Lifesteal. Deal 10 damage randomly split among all minions. Overload: (1)
flavorText: Science rules.

name: Baku the Mooneater
text: Start of Game: If your deck has only odd- Cost cards, upgrade your Hero Power.
flavorText: In her defense, it did look like a cookie.

name: Baleful Banker
text: Battlecry: Choose a friendly minion. Shuffle a copy into your deck.
flavorText: He's gotten big into crypt-o-currency.

name: Baleful Blazer
text: Battlecry: If you've played a Fire spell this turn, destroy a minion.
flavorText: I SHALL PASS!

name: Balinda Stonehearth
text: Battlecry: Draw 2 spells. Swap their Costs with this minion's stats.
flavorText: Imagine her surprise, ending up in a game called Hearthstone.

name: Ball Hog
text: Lifesteal Battlecry and Deathrattle: Deal 3 damage to the lowest Health enemy.
flavorText: "There's no hog in team... ANYMORE! I QUIT!"

name: Ball of Spiders
text: Summon three 1/1 Webspinners with "Deathrattle: Get a random Beast."
flavorText: "THEY'RE EVERYWHERE GET THEM OFF!!!" - Everyone

name: Ball of Spiders
text: Summon three 1/1 Webspinners with "Deathrattle: Get a random Beast."
flavorText: "THEY'RE EVERYWHERE GET THEM OFF!!!" - Everyone

name: Ball of Spiders
text: Summon three 1/1 Webspinners with "Deathrattle: Get a random Beast."
flavorText: "THEY'RE EVERYWHERE GET THEM OFF!!!" - Everyone

name: Balloon Merchant
text: Battlecry: Give your Silver Hand Recruits +1 Attack and Divine Shield.
flavorText: It's a shiny yellow balloon! But it can be popped with a single point of damage.

name: Bamboozle
text: Secret: When one of your minions is attacked, transform it into a random one that costs (3) more.
flavorText: "WE DO YOU A BAMBOOZLE, HOOMAN!"

name: Banana Buffoon
text: Battlecry: Add 2 Bananas to your hand.
flavorText: You could say he has a certain appeal.

name: Banana Vendor
text: Battlecry: Add 2 Bananas to each player's hand.
flavorText: There's always money in the banana stand.

name: Bandersmosh
text: Each turn this is in your hand, transform it into a 5/5 copy of a random Legendary minion.
flavorText: The Shudderwock finds him particularly frumious.

name: Bane of Doom
text: Deal 3 damage to a character. If it dies, summon a random Demon.
flavorText: My advice to you is to avoid Doom, if possible.

name: Bane of Doom
text: Deal 3 damage to a character. If it dies, summon a random Demon.
flavorText: My advice to you is to avoid Doom, if possible.

name: Baneling Barrage
text: Get a 1/1 Baneling that explodes. If you control a Zerg minion, get another Baneling.
flavorText: Banelings, banelings, banelings OHHHH!

name: Banjosaur
text: Rush Whenever this attacks, draw a Beast and gain its stats.
flavorText: You'll all be singing along once he gets to the tyranno-chorus.

name: Barak Kodobane
text: Battlecry: Draw a 1, 2, and 3-Cost spell.
flavorText: They say he's a pro at horseback archery.

name: Barbaric Sorceress
text: Taunt. Battlecry: Swap the Cost of a random spell in each player's hand.
flavorText: Her four arms are for casting, and her forearms are for crushing.

name: Barbed Nets
text: Deal 2 damage to an enemy. If you played a Naga while holding this, choose a second target.
flavorText: I caught'ya a dollar.

name: Barbed Thorn
text: Choose One - Gain Poisonous this turn; or Gain "Deathrattle: Deal 2 damage to all enemies."
flavorText: Comes with a pack of bandages.

name: Bargain Bin
text: Secret: After your opponent plays a minion, spell, or weapon, draw a card of the other 2 types.
flavorText: Used to contain Worgen Greaser until SOMEONE started buffing it.

name: Bargain Bin Buccaneer
text: Rush Combo: Summon a copy of this.
flavorText: Thrift stores have the best buccaneers.

name: Barista Lynchen
text: Battlecry: Add a copy of each of your other Battlecry minions to your hand.
flavorText: "Thanks a latte!"

name: Baritone Imp
text: Battlecry: Take Fatigue damage. Gain that much Attack and Health. Battlecry: Take Fatigue damage. Gain that much Attack and Health.
flavorText: He used to be an epic sax guy, but now he's just a common.

name: Barkshield Sentinel
text: Taunt After you use your Hero Power, gain +2 Health.
flavorText: His bite is worse than his bark.

name: Barkskin
text: Give a minion +3 Health. Gain 3 Armor.
flavorText: Make like a tree… and gain armor.

name: Barnes
text: Battlecry: Summon a 1/1 copy of a random minion in your deck.
flavorText: He used to play every part, until Moroes confiscated his Orb of Deception.

name: Baron Geddon
text: At the end of your turn, deal 2 damage to ALL other characters.
flavorText: Baron Geddon was Ragnaros's foremost lieutenant, until he got FIRED.

name: Baron Rivendare
text: Your minions trigger their Deathrattles twice.
flavorText: There used to be five Horsemen but one of them left because a job opened up in the deadmines and the benefits were better.

name: Baroness Vashj
text: If this would transform into a minion, summon that minion instead.
flavorText: Vashj was supposed to make an appearance in "The Sunken City," but after a freak accident in "Ashes of Outland," she ended up here.

name: Barrel Roll
text: Deal 5 damage to an undamaged character. Costs (1) if you're building a Starship.
flavorText: "We're not even close to Draenor, just do the trick! It'll be fiiiine!"

name: Barrel of Monkeys
text: Summon a 1/4 Monkey with Taunt. (3 Monkeys left!)
flavorText: There used to be four monkeys, but then one fell off and bumped his head.

name: Barrens Blacksmith
text: Frenzy: Give your other minions +2/+2.
flavorText: "Maybe someday you’ll make it to Gadgetzan, kid."

name: Barrens Scavenger
text: Taunt Costs (1) while your deck has 10 or fewer cards.
flavorText: When the hundredth centaur dropped, so did her bracers.

name: Barrens Stablehand
text: Battlecry: Summon a random Beast.
flavorText: It’s never Huffer.

name: Barrens Trapper
text: Your Deathrattle cards cost (1) less.
flavorText: Just add a bit of murloc meat for bait. Beasts can’t resist that special seasoning…

name: Barricade
text: Summon a 2/4 Guard with Taunt. If it's your only minion, summon another.
flavorText: The Alliance and Horde join forces to enforce the fire safety capacity.

name: Barricade Basher
text: Whenever you gain Armor, gain +2/+2 and attack a random enemy minion.
flavorText: She's aggressively affectionate.

name: Bartend-O-Bot
text: Battlecry: Draw an Outcast card and slide it to the left side of your hand.
flavorText: Bartend-O-Bot! Make my Outcast card DO SOMETHING!

name: Bash
text: Deal 3 damage. Gain 3 Armor.
flavorText: You might think bashing doesn't take a lot of practice. It doesn't.

name: Bash
text: Deal 3 damage. Gain 3 Armor.
flavorText: You might think bashing doesn't take a lot of practice. It doesn't.

name: Bashana Runetotem
text: Battlecry: Get three 2/2 Treants. Carve 12 Mana worth of Nature spells into them.
flavorText: "Who carved their name into my totems and RUNED them?!"

name: Bat Mask
text: Set a friendly minion's stats to 1/1. Fill your board with copies of it.
flavorText: LURE'S EFFECT WORE OFF.

name: Batterhead
text: Rush. After this attacks and kills a minion, it may attack again.
flavorText: When it comes to problem-solving, he always uses his head.

name: Battle Rage
text: Draw a card for each damaged friendly character.
flavorText: "You won't like me when I'm angry."

name: Battle Vicar
text: Battlecry: Discover a Holy spell.
flavorText: She's the most down-to-earth paladin you'll ever meet... until she stands up.

name: Battle Vicar
text: Battlecry: Discover a Holy spell.
flavorText: She's the most down-to-earth paladin you'll ever meet... until she stands up.

name: Battle at the End Time
text: Quest: Fill your hand, then empty it. Reward: Tick and Tock.
flavorText: Before Tick and Tock, we grew our entertainment on vines.

name: Battlefield Blaster
text: Battlecry: Choose a spell in your hand to give Spell Damage +1.
flavorText: Call your shot; manifest it into destruction.

name: Battlefield Necromancer
text: At the end of your turn, raise a Corpse as a 1/3 Risen Footman with Taunt.
flavorText: Coming soon: the Hand Necromancer and the Deck Necromancer.

name: Battlefiend
text: After your hero attacks, gain +1 Attack.
flavorText: Say what you like about my hatchet-headed hooligan, he’s my battle-friend.

name: Battlefiend
text: After your hero attacks, gain +1 Attack.
flavorText: Say what you like about my hatchet-headed hooligan, he’s my battle-friend.

name: Battleground Battlemaster
text: Adjacent minions have Windfury.
flavorText: Farm! No wait… Mine! No wait… 3 to Smith—they're taking Farm. Get there now!

name: Battlepickaxe
text: After you play a Taunt minion, gain +1 Durability.
flavorText: You can pick your battles, and you can pick your axes, but you can't uh… pick your friends' battlepickaxes?

name: Battleworn Faceless
text: Battlecry: Transform into a copy of a damaged minion.
flavorText: "I shall hug him and squeeze him and call him Earthen George."

name: Battleworn Vanguard
text: After your hero attacks, summon two 1/1 Felwings.
flavorText: "Welcome to Dun Baldar Felwings! Do you want 'em mild, spicy, or BURNING Legion?"

name: Batty Guest
text: Deathrattle: Summon a 2/1 Bat.
flavorText: His favorite food is chocolate cereal.

name: Bayfin Bodybuilder
text: After a minion is summoned for your opponent during your turn, Silence and destroy it.
flavorText: Loves to run in flow motion.

name: Bazaar Burglary
text: Quest: Add 4 cards from other classes to your hand. Reward: Ancient Blades.
flavorText: Just when you set up your "All-Natural Scented Candles" at the farmer's market and then some STUPID KOBOLD COMES AND TAKES THEM ALL!

name: Bazaar Mugger
text: Rush Battlecry: Add a random minion from another class to your hand.
flavorText: Premium muggings at a discount price.

name: Beached Whale
text: Taunt Battlecry: Deal 10 damage to this minion.
flavorText: Call me Illidan. Some years ago — never mind how long precisely — having little or no gold in my purse, and nothing particular to interest me on Azeroth, I thought I would fly about a little and see the demony part of the world…

name: Beakered Lightning
text: Deal 1 damage to all minions. Overload: (2)
flavorText: Working in a shaman's lab, it's important to be well-grounded.

name: Beaming Sidekick
text: Battlecry: Give a friendly minion +2 Health.
flavorText: Sure, I'll carry the water! And the food! And the tents! And the cursed monkey paw!

name: Beaming Sidekick
text: Battlecry: Give a friendly minion +2 Health.
flavorText: Sure, I'll carry the water! And the food! And the tents! And the cursed monkey paw!

name: Beanstalk Brute
text: Battlecry: Give +4/+4 to the top 3 minions in your deck.
flavorText: I know a guy who might be able to handle this for us. He's kind of a specialist.

name: Bear Trap
text: Secret: After your hero is attacked, summon a 3/3 Bear with Taunt.
flavorText: You'll never guess what's in that conveniently bear-sized, bear-smelling box.

name: Bearon Gla'shear
text: Battlecry: For each Frost spell you've cast this game, summon a 3/4 Elemental that Freezes. ( )
flavorText: When you get hit by a royally bad pun, you just have to grin and bear it.

name: Bearshark
text: Elusive
flavorText: "Candygram."

name: Beast Speaker Taka
text: Battlecry: Discover a Legendary Beast from any class to gain its stats. Deathrattle: Summon it.
flavorText: Each year, Beast Speaker Taka kicks off the Day of Rebirth festivities, heralding the start of the dinosaur hatching season. It is a time to mourn those we have lost, and to celebrate the joy of new life in the Crater.

name: Beast Tripwire
text: Summon a random 5-Cost Beast. Shuffle 2 spells into your deck that do it again when drawn.
flavorText: And it was at that moment, she knew, she tripped up.

name: Beastmaster Leoroxx
text: Battlecry: Summon 3 Beasts from your hand.

name: Doomsayer
text: At the start of your turn, destroy ALL minions.

name: Double Jump

name: Doubling Imp

name: Dozing Marksman

name: Dragon Roar

name: Dragon Speaker

name: Dragon Tales

artistName: L. Lullabi & I. Campelo da Silva

name: Electrowright
text: Battlecry: If you're holding a spell that costs (5) or more, gain +1/+1.

name: Elekk Mount

name: Elemental Companion

name: Elemental Destruction

name: Elemental Evocation

name: Elementary Reaction

text: Battlecry: Shuffle the 'Map to the Golden Monkey' into your deck.
flavorText: A large part of her job entails not mixing up the Map to the Golden Monkey with the Map to Monkey Island.

name: Elise the Enlightened
text: Battlecry: If your deck has no duplicates, duplicate your hand.
flavorText: From cartographer to combatant, Elise has taken the road less traveled—because no one else could find it on a map.

name: Elise the Navigator
text: Battlecry: If your deck started with 10 cards of different Costs, craft a custom location.
flavorText: "I've seen that stump before. We must be getting close!"

name: Elise the Trailblazer
text: Battlecry: Shuffle a sealed Un'Goro pack into your deck. If your deck has no duplicates, draw it.
flavorText: Reno taught her that blazing her own trail is a lot more fun than following someone else's map.

name: Elise, Badlands Savior
text: Battlecry: If your deck started with no duplicates, summon 5/5 copies of 4 random minions in your deck.
flavorText: From the library to the field, she's proved herself to be a leading intellectual.

name: Elite Tauren Champion
text: Finale: Start a ROCK DUEL! Players must spend all their Mana each turn or else they take 8 (or more) damage!
flavorText: Strumming his guitar with a molten ember from the first fire of Azeroth, E.T.C.'s ear-splitting, heart-wrenching, head-banging solo held back Magatha and her forces of evil, single-handedly saving music for centuries to come.

name: Elite Tauren Chieftain
text: Battlecry: Give both players the power to ROCK! (with a Power Chord card)
flavorText: He's looking for a drummer. The current candidates are: Novice Engineer, Sen'jin Shieldmasta', and Ragnaros the Firelord.

name: Elitist Snob
text: Battlecry: For each Paladin card in your hand, randomly gain Divine Shield, Lifesteal, Rush, or Taunt.
flavorText: "I heard the Sire invited a Murloc! How dreadful!"

name: Eliza Goreblade
text: Deathrattle: For the rest of the game, your minions have +1 Attack.
flavorText: Dead men tell no tales, but Undead Pirates are yappers.

name: Elven Archer
text: Battlecry: Deal 1 damage.
flavorText: Don't bother asking her out on a date. She'll shoot you down.

name: Elven Archer
text: Battlecry: Deal 1 damage.
flavorText: Don't bother asking her out on a date. She'll shoot you down.

name: Elven Minstrel
text: Combo: Draw 2 minions from your deck.
flavorText: "After that gig in Hamlin went south, I swore off rats."

name: Elwynn Boar
text: Deathrattle: If you had 7 Elwynn Boars die this game, equip a 15/3 Sword of a Thousand Truths. ( /7)
flavorText: Be grateful we lowered the requirement from 65,340,285.

name: Embalming Ritual
text: Give a minion Reborn.
flavorText: "Guess what! We're getting a new cat."

name: Emberroot Destroyer
text: Whenever your hero takes damage on your turn, deal 3 damage to a random enemy minion.
flavorText: Under Fyrakk's assault, even those with the purest devotion to nature shall burn.

name: Embers of Strength
text: Summon two 1/2 Guards with Taunt. Manathirst (6): Give them +1/+2.
flavorText: Remember, remember, the 1/2's of Ember.

name: Emberscale Drake
text: Battlecry: If you're holding a Dragon, gain 5 Armor.
flavorText: The third little dragon made his armor out of adamantite.

name: Emberscarred Whelp
text: Battlecry: Discover a 5-Cost card. Gain 1 Mana Crystal next turn only.
flavorText: I LOVE YOU NOT!

name: Embiggen
text: Give all minions in your deck +2/+2. They cost (1) more (up to 10).
flavorText: Did you set it to "wumbo?"

name: Emboldening Blade
text: Battlecry: Give your Silver Hand Recruits +1/+1 this game.
flavorText: Blade

name: Embrace Darkness
text: Choose an enemy minion. At the start of your turn, gain control of it.
flavorText: Once you both get comfortable, darkness is actually pretty snuggly.

name: Embrace of Nature
text: Draw a Choose One card. Forge: It has both effects combined.
flavorText: BY OUR POWERS COMBINED…

name: Embrace the Shadow
text: This turn, your healing effects deal damage instead.
flavorText: For when your Auchenai Soulpriests call in sick.

name: Emerald Bounty
text: Draw 2 cards. You can't play them for 2 turns.
flavorText: Overgrowd: (2)

name: Emerald Explorer
text: Taunt Battlecry: Discover a Dragon.
flavorText: Make it a double dragon!

name: Emerald Hive Queen
text: Your minions cost (2) more.
flavorText: She rules the emerald hive at the end of the yellow brick trail.

name: Emerald Reaver
text: Battlecry: Deal 1 damage to each hero.
flavorText: Not to be confused with clubbing enthusiast Emerald Raver.

name: Emerald Skytalon
text: Rush
flavorText: Sworn protectors of Ysera at the Emerald Dragonshrine, these majestic owls have been touched by the powers of the Emerald Dream, taking on an almost crystalline appearance.

name: Emergency Maneuvers
text: Secret: When a friendly minion dies, summon a copy of it. It's Dormant for 1 turn.
flavorText: DO A BARREL ROLL!

name: Emergency Meeting
text: Get two 4/4 Crewmates. Put a random Demon that costs (3) or less between them.
flavorText: You installed a big flashing red button on the ship and expected me NOT to press it?

name: Emergency Surgery
text: Choose an enemy minion. Summon three 3/1 Undead with Lifesteal that attack it.
flavorText: uh, actually I just remembered that I forgot to fast...

name: Emeriss
text: Battlecry: Double the Attack and Health of all minions in your hand.
flavorText: Taste your world's corruption! It tastes like chicken.

name: Emperor Cobra
text: Poisonous
flavorText: The Sholazar Basin is home to a lot of really horrible things. If you're going to visit, wear bug spray. And plate armor.

name: Emperor Thaurissan
text: At the end of your turn, reduce the Cost of cards in your hand by (1).
flavorText: His second greatest regret is summoning an evil Firelord who enslaved his entire people.

name: Emperor Thaurissan
text: At the end of your turn, reduce the Cost of cards in your hand by (1).
flavorText: His second greatest regret is summoning an evil Firelord who enslaved his entire people.

name: Enchanted Cauldron
text: Spellburst: Cast a random spell of the same Cost.
flavorText: Do you smell what the cauldron is cooking? If so, we apologize.

name: Enchanted Raven
flavorText: Once upon a midnight restive, Medivh pondered, feeling festive!

name: Enchanter
text: Enemy minions take double damage during your turn.
flavorText: "I know Scourgebane! Your materials and tips appreciated!"

name: Encroaching Insanity
text: Both players take Fatigue damage, twice.
flavorText: Pictured here is Loken stuck at his 20th hour on Diamond 5.

name: Encumbered Pack Mule
text: Taunt When you draw this, add a copy of it to your hand.
flavorText: "Now I can pick up EVERY knick-knack."

name: Endangered Dodo
text: Taunt Battlecry: If you have 10 or less Health, gain +5/+5 and summon a copy of this.
flavorText: The reports of my imminent demise have been greatly exagger-

name: Endbringer Umbra
text: Battlecry: Trigger the Deathrattles of 5 friendly minions that died this game.
flavorText: After many years of exile, Umbra is so close to returning to her city. When she arrives, she will make sure the Tortollans get what they deserve...

name: Endgame
text: Resurrect your last Demon that died.

name: Endtime Murozond
text: Battlecry: Fill your board with random Dragons. Fully heal your hero. Skip your next turn.
flavorText: Backed into a corner, Murozond has summoned Dragons from all timelines in his final hour. But the worst is yet to come...

name: Endtime Survivor
text: Taunt. Battlecry: If your hero took damage this turn, gain +3/+3.
flavorText: "For Parvink!"

name: Enduring Roach
text: After you use your Hero Power, refresh 2 Mana Crystals.
flavorText: Sorry, these things are in all possible timelines.

name: Energy Shaper
text: Battlecry: Transform all spells in your hand into ones that cost (3) more. (They keep their original Cost.)
flavorText: '"I can do a snake for you?"

name: Enhance-o Mechano
text: Battlecry: Give your other minions Windfury, Taunt, or Divine Shield (at random).
flavorText: His enhancements are gluten free!

name: Enhanced Dreadlord
text: Taunt Deathrattle: Summon a 5/5 Dreadlord with Lifesteal.
flavorText: Photo actually taken across the street in the reflection of a doorknob.

name: Enslaved Fel Lord
text: Taunt. Also damages the minions next to whomever this attacks.
flavorText: He's not really chained up. He just wears that to scare the imps when they get too unruly.

name: Ensmallen
text: Reduce the Cost and Attack of minions in your deck by (1).
flavorText: Come on, you know- I ensmallen, you ensmallen? He she me Ensmallen? Ensmallogy: the study of ensmallening?! IT'S FIRST GRADE.

name: Enter the Coliseum
text: Destroy all minions except each player's highest Attack minion.
flavorText: You have to get past the vendors first. So many are lost to shopping...

name: Enter the Coliseum
text: Destroy all minions except each player's highest Attack minion.
flavorText: You have to get past the vendors first. So many are lost to shopping...

name: Enter the Lost City

flavorText: Day 8. We’ve done it! As night fell, we came upon a brilliantly glowing tunnel guarded by two slumbering Tol’vir. With silent footsteps, we walked through and emerged into the heart of the Lost City! I’m sure my people will welcome us with open arms.

name: Enthralled Shade
text: Deathrattle: Reduce the Cost of cards in your hand that were copied from your opponent by (1).
flavorText: She's a priest main at heart, but is fascinated by the other classes' cards.

name: Enthusiastic Banker
text: At the end of your turn, store a card from your deck. Deathrattle: Add the stored cards to your hand.
flavorText: She offers 0% interest.

name: Entitled Customer
text: Battlecry: Deal damage equal to your hand size to all other minions.
flavorText: "Do you have any idea how much mana I've spent at your store? 6."

name: Entomb
text: Choose an enemy minion. Shuffle it into your deck.
flavorText: It's perfectly safe as long as you remember to put in air holes.

name: Entomologist Toru
text: Battlecry: Put each minion in your hand into 0/1 Jars that cost (1). Break them to release the minions!
flavorText: The lid. The lid. The lid. The lid. The lid. The lid.

name: Entrapped Sorceress
text: Battlecry: If you control a Quest, Discover a spell.
flavorText: "If you're a city guard, you have to tell me. Otherwise, it's entrapment."

name: Entropic Continuity
text: Give your minions +1/+1. Shuffle 2 Shreds of Time into your deck.
flavorText: I thought I signed up to go to the Tropic Continuity...

name: Envenom Weapon
text: Give your weapon Poisonous.
flavorText: Like Deadly Poison, but deadlier.

name: Envoy Rustwix

flavorText: "Time to roll. Rusted Legion, ho!"

name: Envoy of Lazul
text: Battlecry: Look at 3 cards. Guess which one is in your opponent's hand to get a copy of it.
flavorText: "Note to self: possess someone who's local and knows directions next time."

name: Envoy of Prosperity
text: Battlecry: Put the highest Cost card in your hand on top of your deck.
flavorText: "Our prosperity is beyond a shadow of a doubt!"

name: Envoy of the End
text: Taunt Battlecry: Herald your Colossal.
flavorText: The Aspects tried so hard and got so far. But in the end, it didn't even matter.

name: Envoy of the Glade
text: Battlecry: Transform all Neutral cards in your deck into random Druid ones.
flavorText: Announce Gladeness.

name: Eonar, the Life-Binder
text: Titan After this uses an ability, summon a 5/5 Ancient with Taunt.
flavorText: Protector of all living things, she once saved the nascent world-soul of Azeroth from annihilation. It seems mercy was her greatest wisdom.

name: Epoch Stalker
text: Rush, Elusive Battlecry: Summon a copy of this.
flavorText: Look out! It's at your 6 o'clock!

name: Equality
text: Change the Health of ALL minions to 1.
flavorText: We are all special unique snowflakes... with 1 Health.

name: Equality
text: Change the Health of ALL minions to 1.
flavorText: We are all special unique snowflakes... with 1 Health.

name: Eredar Brute
text: Taunt, Lifesteal Costs (1) less for each enemy minion.
flavorText: After a while, the glowing purple stress ball became ineffective at containing his rage.

name: Eredar Deceptor
text: Whenever you draw a card, summon a 1/1 Demon with Rush.
flavorText: But they were all of them deceived, for another Eredar was made.

name: Eredar Deceptor
text: Whenever you draw a card, summon a 1/1 Demon with Rush.
flavorText: But they were all of them deceived, for another Eredar was made.

name: Eredar Skulker
text: Combo and Spellburst: Gain +2 Attack and Stealth.
flavorText: "And I'll do it again, too!"

name: Eroded Sediment
text: Battlecry: If you played an Elemental last turn, Discover any Elemental from the past.
flavorText: A perfect minion for those feeling sedimental about their past.

name: Erupting Volcano
text: Deal 3 damage randomly split among enemies. If you've played a Fire spell this turn, deal 3 more.
flavorText: Too Close Watch Post

name: Escape Artist

flavorText: For my next trick I need a volunteer. Please inspect the battlefield and ensure there are no trap doors or otherwise concealed exits.

name: Escape Pod

flavorText: You can only have two in your deck because we are confident that the Draenei will never run into any dire situations that would warrant any more!

text: Quest: Play 6 Temporary cards. Reward: Underfel Rift.
flavorText: Day 7. A terrible day! The ground opened beneath us, and we fell head over shell into an accursed rift! Fel choked my keen senses, and demonic beasts emerged from the fog. Thank goodness Umbra was able to use her magic to ward them off while we escaped.

name: Escaped Manasaber
text: Stealth Whenever this attacks, gain 1 Mana Crystal this turn only.
flavorText: Captive manasabers don't behave much better--they're always scratching your furniture and coughing up mana balls.

name: Eternal Bloodpetal
text: Deathrattle: Summon a 0/1 Eternal Seedling.
flavorText: The crab grass of Un'Goro.

name: Eternal Firebolt
text: Lifesteal Deal 3 damage to a minion. If it dies, return this to your hand at the end of your turn.
flavorText: Did I forget to turn off the Eternal Oven?

name: Eternal Layover
text: Give ALL minions Reborn, then destroy all minions.
flavorText: Get away from it all! Forever.

name: Eternal Sentinel
text: Battlecry: Unlock your Overloaded Mana Crystals.
flavorText: Just try to avoid eye contact.

name: Eternal Servitude
text: Discover a friendly minion that died this game. Summon it.
flavorText: What do you mean I don't get overtime pay for this?!

name: Eternal Toil
text: Deal 1 damage to a minion. If it survives, draw a card. If it dies, summon a random 1-Cost minion.
flavorText: In the End Time EVERY day is a Monday.

name: Eternium Rover
text: Whenever this minion takes damage, gain 2 Armor.
flavorText: He's all beeps and smiles but you're just a walking pile of armor to him.

name: Eternus
text: Battlecry: Take control of an enemy minion with this minion's Health or less.
flavorText: "I can't believe Eternus would turn on us!" -Infinite Dragonflight

name: Ethereal Arcanist
text: If you control a Secret at the end of your turn, gain +2/+2.
flavorText: The ethereals are wrapped in cloth to give form to their non-corporeal bodies. Also because it's nice and soft.

name: Ethereal Augmerchant
text: Battlecry: Deal 1 damage to a minion and give it Spell Damage +1.
flavorText: According to him, undamaged minions just spell problems.

name: Ethereal Conjurer
text: Battlecry: Discover a spell.
flavorText: Despite the name, he's a solid conjurer.

name: Ethereal Oracle
text: Spell Damage +1 Spellburst: Draw 2 spells.
flavorText: I see 2 spells in my future.

name: Ethereal Peddler
text: Battlecry: If you're holding any cards from another class, reduce their Cost by (2).
flavorText: Yeah, sure. That Ragnaros "fell off the back of a truck".

name: Eulogizer
text: Battlecry: Spend 3 Corpses to deal 3 damage. Forge: Gain them instead.
flavorText: "Sorry for your Ranked mode loss."

name: Eureka!
text: Summon a copy of a random minion from your hand.
flavorText: Genius is 1% inspiration, and 99% drawing your Deathwing.

name: Evasion
text: Secret: After your hero takes damage, become Immune this turn.
flavorText: Works on weapons, missiles, and taxes.

name: Evasive Chimaera
text: Poisonous Elusive
flavorText: One head only tells the truth, while the other head only tells lies. But they both spit poison.

name: Evasive Drakonid
text: Taunt Elusive
flavorText: Doesn't respond to spells, hero powers, calls, or text messages.

name: Evasive Feywing
text: Elusive
flavorText: I've never heard of this fey-dragon called "Brightwing," but if I HAD, I’d say we’d be best friends.

name: Evasive Wyrm
text: Rush Divine Shield Elusive
flavorText: Deftly dodges spells like a real wiggle wyrm.

name: Evasive Wyrm
text: Rush Divine Shield Elusive
flavorText: Deftly dodges spells like a real wiggle wyrm.

name: Eventuality
text: Deal 2 damage. Imbue your Hero Power.
flavorText: At most 29 draws away!

name: Everburning Phoenix
text: Costs (1) less for each card you've played this turn. Deathrattle: At end of turn, get another Phoenix.
flavorText: You'd be making that face too if you just got played for the sixteenth time.

name: Evergreen Stag
text: Elusive Lifesteal Taunt
flavorText: Nevergreen Stag has Enrage, Overkill, and Honorable Kill.

name: Eversong Portal
text: Summon 1 4/4 (Lynx, Lynxes) with Rush (improved by Spell Damage).
flavorText: In retrospect, it's pretty impressive that they had the Lynxes just ready to go.

name: Everyfin is Awesome
text: Give your minions +2/+2. Costs (1) less for each Murloc you control.
flavorText: Everyfin is cool when you're part of a murloc team!

name: Everything Must Go!
text: Summon two random 4-Cost minions. Costs (1) less for each card you've drawn this turn.
flavorText: Go where??

name: Evil Heckler
text: Taunt
flavorText: To be honest, heckling is not the most effective form of evil.

name: Eviscerate
text: Deal 2 damage. Combo: Deal 4 damage instead.
flavorText: There is a high cost to Eviscerating your opponent. You might tweak your elbow! That really hurts!

name: Evocation
text: Fill your hand with random Mage spells. They are Temporary.
flavorText: You too could be the winner of the national spelling spree!

name: Evolution Chamber
text: Give your minions +1 Attack. Give your Zerg an extra +1/+1.
flavorText: "Survival of Swarm dependent on evolution, iteration. Trust process, trust sequences. Swarm will not fail." - Abathur

name: Evolve
text: Transform your minions into random minions that cost (1) more.

name: Evolved Kobold
text: Spell Damage +2
flavorText: You no take tentacle!

name: Evolving Spores
text: Adapt your minions.
flavorText: The most powerful mushrooms are commonly found in boxes marked with "?".

name: Exarch Akama
text: After this attacks, all other friendly minions can attack again (except Exarch Akama).
flavorText: Akama fiercely led the Vindicators in the Draenei's quest to find a new home. If only he knew what would await him on the planet of Draenor…

name: Exarch Hataaru
text: Battlecry: Discover a spell and reduce its Cost by (1). If you play it this turn, repeat this effect.
flavorText: Severely outmatched by the Burning Legion, the Draenei had no hopes of survival… That changed with the invention of arkonite crystals, giving Hataaru and his Artificers new ways to empower their people.

name: Exarch Maladaar
text: Battlecry: The next card you play this turn costs Corpses instead of Mana.
flavorText: The Auchenai order was founded to preserve the memory of Draenei that have passed. But why stop at remembrance when they can live once more?

name: Exarch Naielle
text: Battlecry: Replace your Hero Power with Tracking (Discover a card from your deck).
flavorText: The Great Dark Beyond is vast, with each world containing unknown wonders and horrors alike. To distinguish between the two, Naielle leads the Rangari in surveying all planets the Draenei set foot on.

name: Exarch Othaar
text: Battlecry: If you're building a Starship, get 3 different Arcane spells and reduce their Costs by (2).
flavorText: The temptation of limitless knowledge led some Eredar to join the Burning Legion. In the Sha’tari Draenei, the study of everything lives on.

name: Excavated Evil
text: Deal 3 damage to all minions. Shuffle this card into your opponent's deck.
flavorText: MOM! DAD! DON'T TOUCH IT! IT'S EVIL!!!!!!

name: Excavation Specialist
text: Battlecry: Dredge. Reduce its Cost by (1).
flavorText: With the jungles of Un’goro mapped out and the ruins of Uldum fully uncovered, explorers have to go a little out of their depth in their search of the great unknown.

name: Execute
text: Destroy a damaged enemy minion.
flavorText: It's okay, he deserved it.

name: Execute
text: Destroy a damaged enemy minion.
flavorText: It's okay, he deserved it.

name: Exotic Houndmaster
text: Battlecry: Draw a Beast. Imbue your Hero Power.
flavorText: "Hi lil guy! Have a bite of Green, it's good for you!"

name: Exotic Mountseller
text: Whenever you cast a spell, summon a random 3-Cost Beast.
flavorText: *Taps roof of mammoth* “You can fit so many squirrels in this thing!”

name: Expedition Sergeant
text: Battlecry: The next Draenei you play immediately attacks a random enemy.
flavorText: Expialidocious Sergeant didn't quite fit.

name: Expendable Performers
text: Summon seven 1/1 Illidari with Rush. If they all die this turn, summon seven more.
flavorText: When someone gets injured, it's considered performance art.

name: Experimental Animation
text: Herald Onyxia. Deal 4 damage to all enemy minions.
flavorText: What if we tried 23 frames per second to make it look really weird?

name: Expired Merchant
text: Battlecry: Discard your highest Cost card. Deathrattle: Add 2 copies of it to your hand.
flavorText: The "best by" date is more like a guideline.

name: Explodinator
text: Battlecry: Summon two 0/2 Goblin Bombs.
flavorText: When it absolutely, positively, has to blow up overnight.

name: Explodineer
text: At the end of your turn, shuffle a Bomb into your opponent's deck. When drawn, it explodes for 5 damage.
flavorText: Explodineeeer... explodifaaaar... explode whereeeever you aaaaare...

name: Exploding Bloatbat
text: Deathrattle: Deal 2 damage to all enemy minions.
flavorText: We've all been there after a night of one-too-many funnel cakes.

name: Explore Un'Goro
text: Replace your deck with copies of "Discover a card."
flavorText: It turns out cards DO grow on trees!

name: Explorer's Hat
text: Give a minion +1/+1 and "Deathrattle: Get an Explorer's Hat."
flavorText: Harrison Jones was disappointed that he didn't get to be part of the League of Explorers, but his hat did.

name: Explorer's Hat
text: Give a minion +1/+1 and "Deathrattle: Get an Explorer's Hat."
flavorText: Harrison Jones was disappointed that he didn't get to be part of the League of Explorers, but his hat did.

name: Explosive Evolution
text: Transform a minion into a random one that costs (3) more.
flavorText: Let's give a big hand for goblin experimentation!

name: Explosive Runes
text: Secret: After your opponent plays a minion, deal 6 damage to it and any excess to their hero.
flavorText: Sometimes it's safer NOT to read the warning signs.

name: Explosive Runes
text: Secret: After your opponent plays a minion, deal 6 damage to it and any excess to their hero.
flavorText: Sometimes it's safer NOT to read the warning signs.

name: Explosive Sheep
text: Deathrattle: Deal 2 damage to all minions.
flavorText: How is this supposed to work? Your enemies think, "Hey! Cute sheep!" and run over to cuddle it?

name: Explosive Shot
text: Deal 5 damage to a minion and 2 damage to adjacent ones.
flavorText: Pull the pin, count to 5, then shoot. Then duck.

name: Explosive Trap
text: Secret: When your hero is attacked, deal 2 damage to all enemies.
flavorText: It traps your food AND cooks it for you!

name: Explosive Trap
text: Secret: When your hero is attacked, deal 2 damage to all enemies.
flavorText: It traps your food AND cooks it for you!

name: Extra Arms
text: Give a minion +2/+2. Add 'More Arms!' to your hand that gives +2/+2.
flavorText: All the better to hug you with!

name: Extraterrestrial Egg
text: Deathrattle: Summon a 3/5 Beast that attacks the lowest Health enemy.
flavorText: I'll have mine starry-side up please.

name: Eydis Darkbane
text: Whenever you target this minion with a spell, deal 3 damage to a random enemy.
flavorText: HATES being called "the wonder twins".

name: Eye Beam
text: Lifesteal. Deal 3 damage to a minion. Outcast: This costs (1).
flavorText: Sometimes looks CAN kill.

name: Eye Beam
text: Lifesteal. Deal 3 damage to a minion. Outcast: This costs (1).
flavorText: Sometimes looks CAN kill.

name: Eye for an Eye
text: Secret: When your hero takes damage, deal that much damage to the enemy hero.
flavorText: Justice sometimes takes the form of a closed fist into a soft cheek.

name: Eye of Chaos
text: Battlecry: Get two 1/1 Chaotic Tendrils.
flavorText: Aye aye aye (OF CHAOS)

name: Eye of Shadow
text: Your hero has Lifesteal.
flavorText: It's hard to makeup flavor text sometimes.

name: Eye of the Storm
text: Summon three 5/6 Elementals with Taunt. Overload: (3)
flavorText: If that's the eye, I would hate to see the rest of the storm.

name: Eyes in the Sky
text: Battlecry: Look at 3 cards in your enemy's deck. Pick one to put on top.
flavorText: "I got eyes on Umbra's unstoppable undead army. I'll uh... stay wayyy up here."

name: Eyestalk of C'Thun

flavorText: C'Thun sees all...even next week's lottery numbers.

name: Fable Stablehand
text: Rush Battlecry: If you control a minion with 4 or more Attack, gain +2/+2.
flavorText: She took over the job when Feeble Steeblehand left.

name: Face Collector
text: Echo Battlecry: Add a random Legendary minion to your hand.
flavorText: “I’ll trade you a Malfurion for an Anduin.”

name: Faceless Behemoth
flavorText: Rejected names: Forty-Foot Faceless, Big ol' No-face, Huge Creature Sans Face, Teddy.

name: Faceless Corruptor
text: Rush. Battlecry: Transform one of your minions into a copy of this.
flavorText: What does Madame Lazul have against faces?!

flavorText: Stink bomb go!

name: Fungal Enchanter
text: Battlecry: Restore 2 Health to all friendly characters.
flavorText: Qualifications: Born with pointy hat.

name: Fungal Fortunes
text: Draw 3 cards. Discard any minions drawn.
flavorText: Far superior to a beanstalk boondoggle.

name: Fungalmancer

flavorText: Fungalmancy is the easy major for those who can't cut it at Waxmancy.

name: Funhouse Mirror
text: Summon a copy of an enemy minion. It attacks the original.
flavorText: Funhouse mirror on the wall, Who's the tallest gnome of all?

name: Funkfin

flavorText: Shake your groove fin!

name: Funnel Cake

flavorText: After all this time…. I thought it'd be bigger!

name: Furbolg Mossbinder
text: Battlecry: Transform a friendly minion into a 6/6 Elemental.
flavorText: Behold, the unstoppable power of MOSS!

name: Furious Ettin
text: Taunt
flavorText: One head is a morning person. The other head hates morning people.

name: Furious Felfin
text: Battlecry: If your hero attacked this turn, gain +1 Attack and Rush.
flavorText: Signature moves include Eye Bream, Feast of Soles, and Metamorphofish.

name: Furious Fowls
text: Choose an enemy. Summon two 3/3 Birds with Immune while attacking to attack it.
flavorText: They were already mad and you had to call them 'foul'??

name: Furious Furnace
text: Magnetic Also damages minions next to whomever this attacks.
flavorText: He is absolutely fuming.

name: Furious Howl
text: Draw a card. Repeat until you have at least 3 cards.
flavorText: Hunters make the worst neighbors.

name: Furnace Fuel
text: When this is played, discarded, or destroyed, draw 2 cards.
flavorText: Remember Ultrasaur? This is him now. Feel old yet?

name: Furnacefire Colossus
text: Battlecry: Discard all weapons from your hand and gain their stats.
flavorText: Smelts in his mouth, not in your hand.

name: Fury (Rank 1)
text: Give your hero +2 Attack this turn. (Upgrades when you have 5 Mana.)
flavorText: Rank 3 is when your mom uses your middle name.

name: Future Emissary
text: Battlecry: Reduce the Cost of all Dragons in your hand by (1). Give them +1/+1.
flavorText: When Murozond attacked the past, Nozdormu sought help from the future, even journeying as far as the Forbidden Reach.

name: Futuristic Forefather
text: Taunt. Battlecry: Look at 3 cards. Guess which one is in your opponent's hand to gain +4 Health.
flavorText: Be careful or else you'll end up your own forefather.

name: Fye, the Setting Sun
text: Rush, Lifesteal, Taunt Costs (1) less for each Dragon you've summoned this game.
flavorText: There is a dragon way down in Bloodrock They call the Setting Sun

name: Fyrakk the Blazing
text: Immune to Fire spells. Battlecry: Cast 15 Mana worth of Fire spells at random enemies.
flavorText: Originally devoted to snuffing out the Titans' influence, Shadowflame has twisted Fyrakk's mind into an abyss of malice. His Dreamrender now only hungers for a world of embers.

name: G'huun the Blood God
text: Battlecry: Draw 2 cards. They cost Health instead of Mana.
flavorText: All of the other Old Gods used to laugh and call him names. They never let poor G'huun join in any Old God games.

name: Gadgetzan Auctioneer
text: Whenever you cast a spell, draw a card.
flavorText: He used to run the black market auction house, but there was just too much violence and he had to move.

name: Gadgetzan Ferryman
text: Combo: Return a friendly minion to your hand.
flavorText: Is it just me, or is there something fishy about that ferryman?

name: Gadgetzan Jouster
text: Battlecry: Reveal a minion in each deck. If yours costs more, gain +1/+1.
flavorText: It's not HER fault you didn't put a spinning saw blade on your horse.

name: Gadgetzan Socialite
text: Battlecry: Restore 2 Health.
flavorText: Comment on her height, and she'll go from flapper to kneecapper in seconds flat.

name: Gahz'rilla
text: Whenever this minion takes damage, double its Attack.
flavorText: The Sen'jin High football team is The Gahz'rillas.

name: Gaia, the Techtonic
text: Colossal +2 After a friendly Mech attacks, deal 1 damage to all enemies.
flavorText: Always planning ahead, Ini knew she'd need this invention to protect all her other inventions.

name: Galactic Crusader
text: Taunt Deathrattle: Get two random Holy spells. They cost (3) less.
flavorText: The will was very specific that in the event of the Crusader's death, you were to inherit these random spells. Very odd.

name: Galakrond, the Nightmare
text: Battlecry: Draw 1 card. It costs (0). ( )
flavorText: The enormous creature unfurled terrifying claws dripping with poisonous ichor. King Togwaggle was pleased, but inwardly disappointed the great Nightmare refused to wear the candle.

name: Galakrond, the Tempest
text: Battlecry: Summon two 2/2 Storms with Rush. ( )
flavorText: Hagatha cried out over the winds: "Truly, you are as powerful as the Maelstrom!" To which the Tempest answered: "I AM THE MAELSTROM."

name: Galakrond, the Unbreakable
text: Battlecry: Draw 1 minion. Give it +4/+4. ( )
flavorText: The ground quaked beneath the behemoth as Dr. Boom continued: "…with over 400 TONS of solid Storm Silver plate." Then he beeped a small remote. "And luxury spikes!"

name: Galakrond, the Unspeakable
text: Battlecry: Destroy 1 random enemy minion. ( )
flavorText: Lazul called Galakrond’s name, her voice echoed by whispers from the deep. Both of Galakrond’s eyes opened… and then other eyes opened, as well.

name: Galakrond, the Wretched
text: Battlecry: Summon 1 random Demon. ( )
flavorText: Fel-flames slowly writhed around the skeleton, until the great bones knit themselves together into a demonic monstrosity. Rafaam shielded his face from the heat but could not hide his grin.

name: Gallagio Goon
text: After you play a Battlecry minion, give it +1/+1.
flavorText: Sure the knuckle dusters are kind of redundant but look how cool they look!

name: Galloping Savior
text: Secret: After your opponent plays three cards in a turn, summon a 3/4 Steed with Taunt.
flavorText: "Look to my coming on the first light of the third card."

name: Galvanizer
text: Battlecry: Reduce the Cost of Mechs in your hand by (1).
flavorText: Also known as a power zinc.

name: Game Master
text: The first Secret you play each turn costs (1).
flavorText: "You hear the mrgrgls of angry murlocs approaching. Roll initiative!"

name: Game Master Nemsy
text: Battlecry: Draw a Demon. Deathrattle: Swap places with it.
flavorText: "Rocks fall, and everyone dies. Oopsies!"

name: Gan'arg Glaivesmith
text: Outcast: Give your hero +3 Attack this turn.
flavorText: When isolation becomes motivation.

name: Gang Up
text: Choose a minion. Shuffle 3 copies of it into your deck.
flavorText: If you are thinking about visiting Moonbrook, you better roll deep.

name: Gangplank Diver
text: Dormant for 1 turn. Rush. Immune while attacking.
flavorText: Cownonball!

name: Gankster
text: Stealth After your opponent plays a minion, attack it.
flavorText: UGH! IM GETTING MY MAIN!

name: Garden Gnome
text: Battlecry: If you're holding a spell that costs (5) or more, summon two 2/2 Treants.
flavorText: "Greetings, my little shrubs... It's whittlin' time."

name: Garona Halforcen
text: Fabled. Battlecry: If your opponent is holding King Llane, destroy him and cut their Health in half.
flavorText: Garona made her mark that day. No longer was she simply the assassin of the Horde. She was now the liberator of the dictatorship of Lordaeron.

name: Garona's Last Stand
text: Tradeable Destroy a Legendary minion.
flavorText: Busy anticipating a betrayal by Deathwing, Sinestra never saw Garona coming.

name: Garrison Commander
text: You can use your Hero Power twice a turn.
flavorText: He'll never admit it, but he pushes you hard because he really cares about you.

name: Garrosh's Gift
text: Discover a Temporary Execute, Shield Block, or Brawl.
flavorText: "FROM THE HORDE! AND ESPECIALLY ME!" -Garrosh

name: Garrote
text: Deal 2 damage to the enemy hero. Shuffle 3 Bleeds into your deck that deal 2 more when drawn.
flavorText: "I don't have money… but what I do have is a particular set of skills."

name: Gaslight Gatekeeper
text: Battlecry: Shuffle your hand into your deck, then draw that many cards.
flavorText: This girl is such a boss.

name: Gather Your Party
text: Recruit a minion.
flavorText: Thrilling adventure! Danger guaranteed! Loot uncertain! Death optional! Who’s with me?

name: Gattlesnake
text: At the end of your turn, load two bullets that deal 1 damage each. Deathrattle: Fire at random enemies!
flavorText: He used to be an ordinary snake until he slithered through a saloon during a brawl and walked out looking like this.

name: Gazlowe
text: Whenever you cast a 1-Cost spell, add a random Mech to your hand.
flavorText: Gazlowe was voted "Most Likely to Explode" in high school.

name: Gear Grubber
text: Taunt. If you end your turn with any unspent Mana, reduce this card's Cost by (1).
flavorText: Yeah, “for off-spec,” suuuuure.

name: Gear Shift
text: Shuffle the two left-most cards in your hand into your deck. Draw 3 cards.
flavorText: You mean the PRNDL?

name: Gelbin Mekkatorque
text: Battlecry: Summon an AWESOME invention.
flavorText: He's the leader of the gnomes, and an incredible inventor. He's getting better, too; He turns things into chickens WAY less than he used to.

name: Gelbin of Tomorrow
text: Fabled Battlecry: Put one of each Aura from your deck into the battlefield.
flavorText: In one future, Gelbin invents a way to preserve his brain in a suit of robotic armor, and leads the gnomes into a bright future powered by the Holy Light.

name: Gelbin's Triumph
text: Get a random Paladin Aura. It lasts an additional turn.
flavorText: Lord Victor Nefarius fancied himself Azeroth's greatest inventor, but Gelbin showed him what true innovation can do!

name: Gemstone Hoarder
text: Battlecry: Choose a card in your hand to discard. Deathrattle: Get it back. It costs (1) less.
flavorText: Two gems per day wasn't enough.

name: Gemstudded Golem
text: Taunt Can only attack if you have 5 or more Armor.
flavorText: Perfectly accessorized to attract adventurers.

name: General Vezax
text: Rush Battlecry: Gain 4 Armor. Deathrattle: Lose 4 Armor to resummon this.
flavorText: Contrast this with Specific Vezax, who only gets resummoned if you have exactly 4 Armor.

name: Generous Mummy
text: Reborn Your opponent's cards cost (1) less.
flavorText: Yeah, she's mummified, but her money hasn’t dried up!

name: Genn Greymane
text: Start of Game: If your deck has only even- Cost cards, your starting Hero Power costs (1).
flavorText: Ever since Sylvanas killed his son, he's dreamed of getting… even.

name: Genn, Cursed King
text: While holding this, if the rest of your hand is all even or all odd, transform into the 6/5 Worgen King.
flavorText: "My tenure as the King of Gilneas has been a transformative experience."

name: Gentle Megasaur
text: Battlecry: Adapt your Murlocs.
flavorText: "Low, low rents! Must enjoy a nomadic lifestyle. Quasi-sentient, bipedal, amphibious humanoids ONLY!"

name: Genzo, the Shark
text: Whenever this attacks, both players draw until they have 3 cards.
flavorText: Infamous in the seedy underground card rooms of Gadgetzan, he got his nickname winning the coveted Shark Plushie in the city's first Hearthstone tournament.

name: Geosculptor Yip
text: At the end of your turn, summon a random minion with Cost equal to your Armor (up to 10).
flavorText: Once crafted a gauntlet out of earwax and pure ambition.

name: Germination
text: Summon a copy of a friendly minion. Give the copy Taunt.
flavorText: I regret asking how sporelings are made.

name: Getaway Hogdriver
text: Battlecry: Draw 2 cards. If they're both minions, gain Charge.
flavorText: HOG DRIVERRR!

name: Getaway Kodo
text: Secret: When a friendly minion dies, return it to your hand.
flavorText: Get to da Kodo! Now!

name: Ghastly Conjurer
text: Battlecry: Add a 'Mirror Image' spell to your hand.
flavorText: Wearing purple after the holidays? GHASTLY!

name: Ghastly Gravedigger
text: Battlecry: If you control a Secret, choose a card in your opponent's hand to shuffle into their deck.
flavorText: Some people take their secrets to the grave.

name: Ghost
text: Stealth. Battlecry: If you're building a Starship, destroy the lowest-Cost card in your opponent's hand.
flavorText: Busters!

name: Ghost Light Angler
text: Echo
flavorText: BoOooOogrglgrlgrlooOoOoo!

name: Ghost Writer
text: Battlecry: Discover a spell. Finale: Discover another.
flavorText: This eccentric scribe was cursed to an afterlife of never being recognized for his talents! Muahaha!

name: Ghostly Charger
text: Divine Shield Rush
flavorText: Maybe we should have called him Ghostly Rusher.

name: Ghostly Strike
text: Deal 1 damage. Combo: Draw a card.
flavorText: …What are their demands?

name: Ghoulish Alchemist
text: Battlecry: Your next Concoction costs (0).
flavorText: AND I THREW IT ON THE GROUND!

name: Ghouls' Night
text: Summon five 1/1 Ghouls that attack random enemies.
flavorText: "Ohmygosh, did you hear what Jessicorpse said to Deathanny??"

name: Giant Anaconda
text: Taunt Deathrattle: Summon a minion from your hand with 5 or more Attack.
flavorText: Must be something it ate.

name: Giant Mastodon
text: Taunt
flavorText: Still salty about it not being the "Year of the Mastodon."

name: Giant Sand Worm
text: Whenever this attacks and kills a minion, it may attack again.
flavorText: Banned from every all-you-can-eat buffet on Azeroth.

name: Giant Tumbleweed!!!
text: Deal 6 damage to all minions. Summon a 6/6 Tumbleweed.
flavorText: Skarr's second-biggest hobby after laying waste to the Badlands is bowling.

name: Giant Wasp
text: Stealth Poisonous
flavorText: Float like a butterfly, sting like a giant wasp!

name: Gibbering Reject
text: After your hero attacks, summon another Gibbering Reject.
flavorText: Don't get it wet or feed it after midnight.

name: Gibberling
text: Spellburst: Summon a Gibberling.
flavorText: "As a Linguistics student I have studied the Gibberlings. I have determined they are speaking Gibberish."

name: Gift of Luminance
text: Give a minion Divine Shield, then summon a 1/1 copy of it.
flavorText: You get a small version of yourself in a snow globe to remember the moment.

name: Gift of the Naaru
text: Restore 3 Health to all characters. If any are still damaged, draw a card.
flavorText: What do I look like, a charity?

name: Gift of the Wild
text: Give your minions +2/+2 and Taunt.
flavorText: The gift that keeps on living.

name: Gifts of Azshara
text: Draw a card. If you played a Naga while holding this, do it again.
flavorText: Barber: What do you want? Naga: You ever have a thirst for arcane power? Barber: Say no more.

name: Giftwrapped Whelp
text: Battlecry: If you're holding a Dragon, give it and this minion +1/+1.
flavorText: Don't forget to poke fire-breathing holes in the box!

name: Gigafin
text: Colossal +1. Battlecry: Devour all enemy minions. Deathrattle: Spit them back out.
flavorText: How much storage does Gigafin's Maw have? About a giga bite.

name: Gigantotem
text: Costs (1) less for each Totem you've summoned this game.
flavorText: Totem Golem's uncle, gone too soon.

name: Giggling Inventor
text: Battlecry: Summon two 1/2 Mechs with Taunt and Divine Shield.
flavorText: "I shall build a mighty golden paladin! And he will GREET the WORLD!"

name: Giggling Toymaker
text: Deathrattle: Summon two 1/2 Mechs with Taunt and Divine Shield.
flavorText: "HAHAhehehe. Hahaha he." -Me when I'm making toys

name: Gilblin Stalker
text: Stealth
flavorText: "Shhh, I think I hear something." "Ah, it's probably nothing." - Every Henchman

name: Gilded Gargoyle
text: Deathrattle: Add a Coin to your hand.
flavorText: You hear a coin rattling inside the slotted gargoyle...What could it mean?

name: Gilnean Royal Guard
text: Divine Shield, Rush Each turn this is in your hand, swap its Attack and Health.
flavorText: Admittedly, they kind of dropped the ball with Prince Liam.

name: Glacial Advance
text: Deal 4 damage. Your next spell this turn costs (2) less.
flavorText: You just wait, I'll get there in 10 years and then you'll be sorry.

name: Glacial Mysteries
text: Put one of each Secret from your deck into the battlefield.
flavorText: The secret is in the frosting.

name: Glacial Shard
text: Battlecry: Freeze an enemy.
flavorText: Ice, ice, baby!

name: Glacial Shard
text: Battlecry: Freeze an enemy.
flavorText: Ice, ice, baby!

name: Glaciate
text: Discover an 8-Cost minion. Summon and Freeze it.
flavorText: We now have a more accurate answer to the age-old question "What's cooler than being cool?"

name: Glaciate
text: Discover an 8-Cost minion. Summon and Freeze it.
flavorText: We now have a more accurate answer to the age-old question "What's cooler than being cool?"

name: Glacier Racer
text: Spellburst: Deal 3 damage to all Frozen enemies.
flavorText: It’s just not the same without a super suit.

name: Glade Ecologist
text: Deathrattle: Get a 1-Cost Holy spell that gives a minion +2 or -2 Health.
flavorText: The dude minored in Underfel Biology. Now that's a renaissance Tortollan!

name: Gladesong Siren
text: Lifesteal Costs (1) if you've cast a Holy and Shadow spell this turn.
flavorText: When she shifts into minor key she really throws the void-holy balance out of whack.

name: Gladiator's Longbow
text: Your hero is Immune while attacking.
flavorText: The longbow allows shots to be fired from farther away and is useful for firing on particularly odorous targets.

name: Gladiatorial Combat
text: Summon a random minion from your deck. Summon a 5/5 Tiger with Stealth for your opponent.
flavorText: I could win this fight with one head tied behind my back!

name: Glaivebound Adept
text: Battlecry: If your hero attacked this turn, deal 4 damage.
flavorText: "Initiate, this is your glaive. Think of it as an extension of yourself... Did you just throw it?!"

name: Glaiveshark
text: Battlecry: If your hero attacked this turn, deal 2 damage to all enemies.
flavorText: Can smell a drop of vengeance in the water up to a mile away.

name: Glaivetar
text: Deathrattle: Draw (card, cards). (Play Outcast cards while equipped to improve!)
flavorText: Might need tuning, I think it's a bit sharp.

name: Glaivezooka
text: Battlecry: Give a random friendly minion +1 Attack.
flavorText: For the times when a regular bazooka just isn't enough.

name: Glide
text: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Draw 4 cards. Outcast: Your opponent does the same.
flavorText: "Come with me, and you'll see, a whole new hand of possibly the same cards."

name: Glinda Crowskin
text: Minions in your hand have Echo.
flavorText: Summon an unlimited* number of minions!** *Six **Wisps

name: Glitter Moth
text: Battlecry: If your deck has only odd-Cost cards, double the Health of your other minions.
flavorText: Some moths are attracted to flame. This one's attracted to disco.

name: Gloom Stag
text: Taunt Battlecry: If your deck has only odd-Cost cards, gain +2/+2.
flavorText: Majestic. Ethereal. Still pretty down in the dumps, though.

name: Gloomstone Guardian
text: Taunt. Choose One - Discard 2 cards; or Destroy one of your Mana Crystals. Forge: Do NEITHER.
flavorText: From the same people who brought you Choose One, and Choose Twice, comes the exciting prequel: Choose NEITHER!

name: Gloop Sprayer
text: Battlecry: Summon a copy of each adjacent minion.
flavorText: "Are you sure that's enough gloop?" "Hold on."

name: Glory Chaser
text: After you play a Taunt minion, draw a card.
flavorText: When you've reached the peak of competition twice, how hard can winning one valley be?

name: Glow-Tron
text: Magnetic
flavorText: They tried for weeks to make a stealth version, but eventually decided to just let it glow.

name: Glowfly Swarm
text: Summon a 2/2 Glowfly for each spell in your hand.
flavorText: Glowflies are distant relations to spelling bees.

name: Glowroot Lure
text: Taunt. Costs (1) less for each time you used your Hero Power this game.
flavorText: You'd think this is a creation of the Emerald Nightmare, but you would be wrong.

name: Glowstone Gyreworm
text: Lifesteal Quickdraw: Deal 5 damage. Forge: Change Quickdraw to Battlecry.
flavorText: Believe it or not, this is Tram Conductor Gerry's Gyreworm. But is it pronounced Gerry's Gyreworm, Gerry's Gyreworm, Gerry's Gyreworm, or Gerry's Gyreworm?

name: Glowstone Technician
text: Battlecry: Give all minions in your hand +2/+2.
flavorText: "Windell! More light!" "I'm givin' it all she's got, Kangor!"

name: Glugg the Gulper
text: Colossal +3 After a friendly minion dies, gain its original stats.
flavorText: Food can be scarce in the Abyssal Depths, leading its top predators to pursue any potential source of sustenance. Even extra crunchy ones.

name: Gluttonous Ooze
text: Battlecry: Destroy your opponent's weapon and gain Armor equal to its Attack.
flavorText: Three time winner of the Un'Goro weapon eating contest.

name: Gnash
text: Give your hero +3 Attack this turn. Gain 3 Armor.
flavorText: It's rude to gnash with your mouth open.

name: Gnawing Greenfin
text: Battlecry: Get a random Murloc.
flavorText: "Are you eating bark again!?" "Gnawwwww...."

name: Gnome Muncher
text: Taunt, Lifesteal At the end of your turn, attack the lowest Health enemy.
flavorText: Gnom gnom gnom.

name: Gnome Private
text: Honorable Kill: Gain +2 Attack.
flavorText: She's doing her part.

name: Gnomeferatu
text: Battlecry: Remove the top card of your opponent's deck.
flavorText: She prefers the term "Glampire."

name: Gnomeferatu
text: Battlecry: Remove the top card of your opponent's deck.
flavorText: She prefers the term "Glampire."

name: Gnomelia, S.A.F.E. Pilot
text: Rush. Also damages minions next to whomever this attacks. Deathrattle: Deal 2 damage to all enemies.
flavorText: Never learned how to L.A.N.D.

name: Gnomeregan Infantry
text: Charge Taunt
flavorText: The gnomes are valiant and ready to return to their irradiated, poorly ventilated homeland!

name: Gnomish Experimenter
text: Battlecry: Draw a card. If it's a minion, transform it into a Chicken.
flavorText: He's legitimately surprised every time he turns himself into a chicken.

name: Gnomish Inventor
text: Battlecry: Draw a card.
flavorText: She's never quite sure what she's making, she just knows it's AWESOME!

name: Go with the Flow
text: Choose a minion. If it's an enemy, Freeze it. If it's friendly, give it Spell Damage +1.
flavorText: Just go with the flow, bro! No mo' woe fo' yo'!

name: Goblin Auto-Barber
text: Battlecry: Give your weapon +1 Attack.
flavorText: This guy is excellent at adjusting your haircut and/or height.

name: Goblin Blastmage
text: Battlecry: If you control a Mech, deal 6 damage randomly split among all enemies.
flavorText: If you can't find a bomb to throw, just pick up any goblin invention and throw that.

name: Goblin Blastmage
text: Battlecry: If you control a Mech, deal 6 damage randomly split among all enemies.
flavorText: If you can't find a bomb to throw, just pick up any goblin invention and throw that.

name: Goblin Bomb
text: Deathrattle: Deal 2 damage to the enemy hero.
flavorText: They're Dr. Boom's babies. His baby boomers.

name: Goblin Prank
text: Give a friendly minion +3/+3 and Rush. It dies at end of turn.
flavorText: "Ha ha! Glork looks ridiculous! ...Glork? Glork?"

name: Goblin Sapper
text: Has +4 Attack while your opponent has 6 or more cards in hand.
flavorText: He’s not such a binge exploder anymore. These days, he only explodes socially.

name: Goboglide Tech
text: Battlecry: If you control a Mech, gain +1/+1 and Rush.
flavorText: The word "glide" is always in quotes in the manual.

name: Godfrey the Betrayer
text: Start of Game: Overdrawn cards return to your hand when you have space. They cost (1) less.
flavorText: Hunted down and cornered in Shadowfang Keep, Godfrey was left with no choice but to go quietly. But before his time is up, that monster, Crowley, will get what’s coming to him.

name: Going Down Swinging
text: Give your hero +2 Attack and Immune this turn, then attack each enemy minion.
flavorText: Halveria was outcast from Gilneas for being too edgy, which she sees as an achievement.

name: Golakka Crawler
text: Battlecry: Destroy a Pirate and gain +1/+1.
flavorText: Universally adored by both control decks and ninjas.

name: Golakka Glutton
text: Battlecry: Destroy a Beast and gain +1/+1.
flavorText: We lost our last cook to one of these.

name: Gold Panner
text: At the end of your turn, draw a card.
flavorText: "I don't know why everyone's got their overalls in a jumble with Azerite minin' when there's all this GOLD for the takin'!"

name: Gold Road Grunt
text: Taunt Frenzy: Gain Armor equal to the damage taken.
flavorText: No, no, no, Gold Roads are very different from Yellow Brick Roads.

name: Golden Scarab
text: Battlecry: Discover a 4-Cost card.
flavorText: Who actually puts all the gold plating on these things, and why?

name: Goldpetal Drake
text: Battlecry and Deathrattle: Imbue your Hero Power.
flavorText: All that glitters is gold... Petal. Drake.

name: Goldrinn
text: Rush Friendly Beasts deal double damage.
flavorText: His relentless ferocity has made him well known among many peoples and by many names, including Lo’Gosh and the Great Wolf.

name: Goldshire Footman
text: Taunt
flavorText: If 1/2 minions are all that is defending Goldshire, you would think it would have been overrun years ago.

name: Goldshire Gnoll
text: Rush Costs (1) less for each other card in your hand.
flavorText: They're searching for one ring. They're pretty sure someone said Goldshire.

name: Goldwing
text: Rush Battlecry: If you're holding a Mech, gain Windfury.
flavorText: This HAS to be worth more dust, right?

name: Golganneth, the Thunderer
text: Titan Your first spell each turn costs (3) less.
flavorText: With dominion over the seas and skies, Golganneth fearlessly wields the power of nature to serve the Pantheon.

name: Libram of Justice
