flavorText: Proper justice. Throw the book at him!

name: Libram of Wisdom
text: Give a minion +1/+1 and "Deathrattle: Add a 'Libram of Wisdom' spell to your hand."
flavorText: The best wisdom is passed on.

name: Licensed Adventurer
text: Battlecry: If you control a Quest, add a Coin to your hand.
flavorText: "Just point me in the vague direction of the things you want smashed, and you got yourself a deal!"

name: Lie in Wait
text: Quest: Shuffle cards into your deck, 5 times. Reward: Master Dusk.
flavorText: Day 2. Our first night in the Crater was a tad rough on this old shell. I can’t shake the feeling that we’re being watched. I swear I saw a glint of shining silver in the dark. I was going to ask Umbra about it at breakfast, but she never turned up.

name: Life Cycle
text: Destroy a minion. Summon a random minion of the same Cost to replace it.
flavorText: It's the cyyyyyycle of liiiiiife.

name: Life Sentence
text: Remove a minion from the game.
flavorText: Also sentenced to laugh and love.

name: Life from Death
text: Draw 3 cards. Infuse ( ): This costs (1).
flavorText: Just because you came up with a nicer name for it doesn't mean that necromancy is any more justified.

name: Lifebinder's Gift
text: Choose One - Get 2 random Nature spells; or Reduce the Cost of spells in your hand by (1).
flavorText: Everyone's investing in Nature spells these days, but that bubble is about to burst.

name: Lifebloom
text: Restore 8 Health to all friendly characters. Summon two random 8-Cost minions.
flavorText: It's the 'bolg necessities.

name: Lifedrinker
text: Battlecry: Deal 3 damage to the enemy hero. Restore 3 Health to your hero.
flavorText: In a pinch, he'll also settle for Holy Water: Zero.

name: Lifedrinker
text: Battlecry: Deal 3 damage to the enemy hero. Restore 3 Health to your hero.
flavorText: In a pinch, he'll also settle for Holy Water: Zero.

name: Lifeguard
text: Taunt Battlecry: The next spell you cast has Lifesteal.
flavorText: Hey, no aggro in the pool!

name: Liferender
text: Battlecry: If your hero's Health changed this turn, deal 6 damage to an enemy minion.
flavorText: Redirect your pain into a healthier outlet: your opponent.

name: Lifesaving Aura
text: At the end of your turn, get a 1-Cost Sunscreen that gives +1/+2. Lasts turns.
flavorText: One ring to rule them all, and in the sunlight save them.

name: Lifeweaver
text: Whenever you restore Health, add a random Druid spell to your hand.
flavorText: Lifeweaving is all well and good until it's time to cut the thread.

name: Lift Off
text: Draw 2 Terran cards. Summon a 2/1 Starship Piece with an effect when launched.
flavorText: It's a bird! It's a plane! It's a burning command center slowly moving to the corner of the map!

name: Light of the Naaru
text: Restore 3 Health. If the target is still damaged, summon a Lightwarden.
flavorText: "Light it up!" - Command given to both Lightwardens and Goblins holding Flamecannons.

name: Light of the New Moon
text: Give a minion +3/+3. (Cast (spell, spells) to return this to your hand when played.)
flavorText: UM ACTUALLY THAT’S A WANING CRESCENT

name: Light of the Phoenix
text: Draw 2 cards. Costs (1) less for each damaged friendly character.
flavorText: It's 3 in the morning, could you PLEASE put out that phoenix?!

name: Light's Champion
text: Battlecry: Silence a Demon.
flavorText: When there's something strange (say, a gibbering demon) in your neighborhood, who are you going to call?

name: Light's Justice
flavorText: Prince Malchezaar was a collector of rare weapons. He'd animate them and have them dance for him.

name: Light's Sorrow
text: After a friendly minion loses Divine Shield, gain +1 Attack.
flavorText: These sorrows cut deep.

name: Lightbomb
text: Deal damage to each minion equal to its Attack.
flavorText: This is what happens when you allow goblins to be priests.

name: Lightbringer's Hammer
text: Lifesteal Can't attack heroes.
flavorText: This entire city must be purged. Or at least just the minions.

name: Lightforged Blessing
text: Twinspell Give a friendly minion Lifesteal.
flavorText: Some might call this a lightforgery.

name: Lightforged Cariel
text: Battlecry: Deal 2 damage to all enemies. Equip a 2/5 Immovable Object.
flavorText: Her faith, unshakable. Her shield, immovable. Her enemies, irredeemable.

name: Lightforged Crusader
text: Battlecry: If your deck has no Neutral cards, add 5 random Paladin cards to your hand.
flavorText: Self-appointed president of the Paladins Only Paladin Club.

name: Lightforged Zealot
text: Battlecry: If your deck has no Neutral cards, equip a 4/2 Truesilver Champion.
flavorText: Card-carrying member of the Paladins Only Paladin Club.

name: Lightfused Manasaber
text: Rush Spellburst: Gain Divine Shield.
flavorText: Oh no, I ran out of fused Mana!

name: Lightfused Stegodon
text: Battlecry: Adapt your Silver Hand Recruits.
flavorText: “Come now, Johnston. I think those horns are quite fetching on you.”

name: Lightmaw Netherdrake
text: Battlecry: If you're holding a Holy and a Shadow spell, deal 3 damage to all other minions.
flavorText: Do you think it's a glass half full kind of Netherdrake, or a glass half empty, inescapable void kind of Netherdrake?

name: Lightmender
text: Taunt. Choose One - +3 Attack and Divine Shield; or +3 Health and Lifesteal.
flavorText: How many lightmenders does it take to mend a lightorb?

name: Lightning Bloom
text: Refresh 2 Mana Crystals. Overload: (2)
flavorText: Curiously, this plant never blooms in the same place twice.

name: Lightning Bolt
text: Deal 3 damage. Overload: (1)
flavorText: Lightning Bolt! Lightning Bolt! Lightning Bolt!

name: Lightning Bolt
text: Deal 3 damage. Overload: (1)
flavorText: Lightning Bolt! Lightning Bolt! Lightning Bolt!

name: Lightning Breath
text: Deal 4 damage to a minion. If you're holding a Dragon, also damage its neighbors.
flavorText: Recipe: One dragon, four wool socks, thick shag carpet.

name: Lightning Reflexes
text: Discover a Nature spell. If you play it this turn, Discover another.
flavorText: If you can dodge a lightning bolt, you can dodge a ball.

name: Lightning Rod
text: Deal 2 damage to a friendly minion to deal 4 damage to a random enemy minion.
flavorText: Rodney despised his nickname, but took comfort in knowing none doubted his power.

name: Lightning Storm
text: Deal 3 damage to all enemy minions. Overload: (1)
flavorText: An umbrella won't be effective, I'm afraid.

name: Lightning Storm
text: Deal 3 damage to all enemy minions. Overload: (1)
flavorText: An umbrella won't be effective, I'm afraid.

name: Lightray
text: Taunt Costs (1) less for each Paladin card you've played this game.
flavorText: Lightrays, much like rays of light, tend to be seen closer to the surface.

name: Lightshow
text: Shoot beams at enemies that each deal 2 damage. Your future Lightshows shoot one more beam.
flavorText: Always remember P.L.U.R.: Peace, Laser-beams, Unity, Respect.

name: Lightshower Elemental
text: Taunt Deathrattle: Restore 8 Health to all friendly characters.
flavorText: The forecast calls for light showers, but you won’t need an umbrella.

name: Lightshower Elemental
text: Taunt Deathrattle: Restore 8 Health to all friendly characters.
flavorText: The forecast calls for light showers, but you won’t need an umbrella.

name: Lightspawn
text: This minion's Attack is always equal to its Health.
flavorText: Spawn of the Light? Or Pawn of the Lights?

name: Lightspeed
text: Echo Give a minion +1/+2 and Rush.
flavorText: Speed. I am speed.

name: Lightsteed
text: Your healing effects also give affected minions +2 Health.
flavorText: All the steed, half the calories.

name: Lightwarden
text: Whenever a character is healed, gain +2 Attack.
flavorText: She’s smaller than her sisters Mediumwarden and Heavywarden.

name: Lightwell
text: At the start of your turn, restore 3 Health to a damaged friendly character.
flavorText: It isn't clear if people ignore the Lightwell, or if it is just invisible.

name: Likkim
text: Has +2 Attack while you have Overloaded Mana Crystals.
flavorText: "I double frog dare you!"

name: Lil' Exorcist
text: Taunt Battlecry: Gain +1/+1 for each enemy Deathrattle minion.
flavorText: Warlocks have the town exorcist on speed dial in case they unleash the wrong demon.

name: Lilian Voss
text: Battlecry: Replace spells in your hand with random spells (from your opponent's class).
flavorText: She doesn't feel pity, or remorse, or fear. And she absolutely will not stop... ever, until all necromancers are dead.

name: Lilypad Lurker
text: Battlecry: If you played an Elemental last turn, transform an enemy minion into a 0/1 Frog with Taunt.
flavorText: Honestly, the frog did nothing wrong.

name: Line Cook
text: Tradeable Taunt. When you draw this, get a copy of it.
flavorText: Hold up. Let her cook.

name: Line Hopper
text: Your Outcast cards cost (1) less.
flavorText: There are two things Demon Hunters know: hopping, and cutting.

name: Linecracker
text: Overkill: Double this minion's Attack.
flavorText: "Tell me if you’ve heard this one!"

name: Linedance Partner
text: Battlecry: If you're holding another 3-Cost card, summon a random 3-Cost minion.
flavorText: Where did you come from? (Linedance Partner's Battlecry) Where did you go? (Face)

name: Lingering Zombie
text: Deathrattle: Summon a 1/1 Disarmed Zombie with "Deathrattle: Summon a 1/1 Zombie."

name: Lion's Frenzy
text: Has Attack equal to the number of cards you've drawn this turn.
flavorText: Only as sharp as your draw.

name: Lion's Guard
text: Battlecry: If you have 15 or less Health, gain +2/+4 and Taunt.
flavorText: She takes the lion's share of the credit, too.

name: Livewire Lance
text: After your hero attacks, add a Lackey to your hand.
flavorText: The lance is heavy but it’s the battery pack that really does a number on the shoulders.

name: Living Dragonbreath
text: Your minions can't be Frozen.
flavorText: If you want that muscular physique, you've really gotta feel the burn.

name: Living Flame
text: Deathrattle: Draw a Fire spell.
flavorText: "Get a load of this guy."

name: Living Garden
text: Battlecry: Imbue your Hero Power. Reduce the Cost of a minion in your hand by (1).
flavorText: Prairies, horizons, gardens, what's next??

name: Living Horizon
text: Taunt, Divine Shield Costs (1) less for each other card in your hand.
flavorText: Even in the darkest of days, the sun never sets on the Badlands.

name: Living Mana
text: Transform your Mana Crystals into 2/2 Treants. Recover the mana when they die.
flavorText: If you truly love your mana, set it free.

name: Living Monument
text: Taunt
flavorText: This is not the greatest card in the world. This is just a monument.

name: Living Paradox
text: Elusive Battlecry: Summon two 2/1 Living Paradoxes with Elusive.
flavorText: We just need to find the right clone to pin this all on.

name: Living Prairie
text: Battlecry: If you played an Elemental last turn, summon two 3/3 Cows with Rush.
flavorText: Whoooooa, we're half way there Whooa-oh, -

name: Living Roots
text: Choose One - Deal 2 damage; or Summon two 1/1 Saplings.
flavorText: 2 out of 2 saplings recommend that you summon the saplings.

name: Living Roots
text: Choose One - Deal 2 damage; or Summon two 1/1 Saplings.
flavorText: 2 out of 2 saplings recommend that you summon the saplings.

name: Living Seed (Rank 1)
text: Draw a Beast. Reduce its Cost by (1). (Upgrades when you have 5 Mana.)
flavorText: Every desert needs an oasis. And it's Guff's duty to make it happen.

name: Lo'Gosh's Last Stand
text: Give a minion "Deathrattle: Summon a random minion from your hand."
flavorText: As the Cataclysm loomed, Lo'Gosh and his friends fought side by side for the fate of Azeroth as valiantly as they once fought to entertain the crowds in the Crimson Ring.

name: Lo'Gosh, Blood Fighter
text: Fabled, Rush. Deathrattle: Summon a Blood Fighter from your hand. It gains +5/+5 and attacks a random enemy.
flavorText: In the Crimson Ring they call him Lo'gosh, the Ghost Wolf. He's forgotten the time when he was called by another name: Varian Wrynn, King of Stormwind.

name: Load the Chamber
text: Deal 2 damage. Your next Naga, Fel spell, and weapon cost (1) less.
flavorText: Wait! Before we duel, I gotta install these shaders.

name: Loan Shark
text: Battlecry: Give your opponent a Coin. Deathrattle: You get two.
flavorText: Pay up or you'll be swimming with the fishes.

name: Loatheb
text: Battlecry: Enemy spells cost (5) more next turn.
flavorText: Loatheb used to be a simple Bog Beast. This is why we need stricter regulations on mining and agriculture.

name: Lock On
text: Set a minion’s Health to 1. Your next Starship launch costs (2) less.
flavorText: Time to lock in. *ahem* I mean lock on.

name: Lock and Load
text: Each time you cast a spell this turn, get a random Hunter card.
flavorText: Rexxar narrowed his eyes, grabbed his machine gun, and said: "It's go time. Lock and load." This card pays homage to that special moment.

name: Lock and Load
text: Each time you cast a spell this turn, get a random Hunter card.
flavorText: Rexxar narrowed his eyes, grabbed his machine gun, and said: "It's go time. Lock and load." This card pays homage to that special moment.

name: Loh, the Living Legend
text: Battlecry: Your minions cost (5) this game.
flavorText: Pretty spry for a 4217 year old.

name: Loken, Jailer of Yogg-Saron
text: Battlecry: Discover a minion from your deck. Summon a Tentacle with its stats and Taunt.
flavorText: Really great at his job! - Yogg-Saron

name: Lokholar the Ice Lord
text: Rush, Windfury Costs (5) less if you have 15 Health or less.
flavorText: Suddenly the names of Iceblood Tower and Iceblood Garrison make a lot more sense.

name: Lone Champion
text: Battlecry: If you control no other minions, gain Taunt and Divine Shield.
flavorText: He is a champion, with no friends. He'll keep on fighting, til the end!

name: Longneck Egg
text: Deathrattle: Summon a 3/3 Beast. Give your minions +1/+1.
flavorText: Baby longnecks are unfortunately not called shortnecks.

name: Loose Specimen
text: Battlecry: Deal 6 damage randomly split among other friendly minions.
flavorText: You leave Deathstalker Rexxar alone in the lab for TWO minutes…

name: Loot Hoarder
text: Deathrattle: Draw a card.
flavorText: Always roll need.

name: Loot Hoarder
text: Deathrattle: Draw a card.
flavorText: Always roll need.

name: Lor'themar Theron
text: Battlecry: Double the stats of all minions in your deck.
flavorText: Out of all his life accomplishments, making a 2/2 Tinyfin is his finest.

name: Lord Barov
text: Battlecry: Set the Health of all other minions to 1. Deathrattle: Deal 1 damage to all minions.
flavorText: Alexei Barov stayed at Scholomance despite leasing it to Kel’Thuzad. He says it’s for "supervision."

name: Lord Godfrey
text: Battlecry: Deal 2 damage to all other minions. If any die, repeat this Battlecry.
flavorText: Betrayed the Alliance. Betrayed the Horde. All for 200 achievement points and a sweet, sweet hat.

name: Lord Jaraxxus
text: Battlecry: Equip a 3/8 Blood Fury.
flavorText: "TRIFLING GNOME! YOUR ARROGANCE WILL BE YOUR UNDOING!!!!"

name: Lord Jaraxxus
text: Battlecry: Equip a 3/8 Blood Fury.
flavorText: "TRIFLING GNOME! YOUR ARROGANCE WILL BE YOUR UNDOING!!!!"

name: Lord Marrowgar
text: Battlecry: Raise ALL of your Corpses as 1/1 Risen Golems with Rush. For each that can't fit, give one +2/+2.
flavorText: And now, Lord Marrowgar with the weather.

name: Lord of the Arena
text: Taunt
flavorText: He used to be a 2100+ rated arena player, but that was years ago and nobody can get him to shut up about it.

name: Lorekeeper Polkelt
text: Battlecry: Reorder your deck from the highest Cost card to the lowest Cost card.
flavorText: quicksort [] = [] quicksort (x:xs) = quicksort small ++ (x : quicksort large) where small = [y | y <- xs, y <= x] large = [y | y <- xs, y > x]

name: Lorewalker Cho
text: Whenever a player casts a spell, put a copy into the other player’s hand.
flavorText: Lorewalker Cho archives and shares tales from the land of Pandaria, but his favorite story is the one where Joey and Phoebe go on a road trip.

name: Lorewalker Cho
text: Whenever a player casts a spell, put a copy into the other player’s hand.
flavorText: Lorewalker Cho archives and shares tales from the land of Pandaria, but his favorite story is the one where Joey and Phoebe go on a road trip.

name: Lost Exarch
text: Deathrattle: Spend all your Mana. Summon that many 2/2 Zombies with Rush.
flavorText: She resisted the temptation of the Burning Legion's power only to fall victim to the Scourge.

name: Lost Spirit
text: Deathrattle: Give your minions +1 Attack.
flavorText: She simply refuses to ask for directions.

name: Lost Tallstrider
flavorText: The message, "If found, please return to Mulgore," is tattooed on his rear.

name: Lost in the Jungle
text: Summon two 1/1 Silver Hand Recruits.
flavorText: George and Karl were never heard from again.

name: Lost in the Park
text: Questline: Gain 4 Attack with your hero. Reward: Gain 5 Armor.
flavorText: Mister, have you seen my Archdruid?

name: Lothar
text: At the end of your turn, attack a random enemy minion. If it dies, gain +3/+3.
flavorText: Has been around since before there were paladins and those newfangled paladin mechs.

name: Lothraxion the Redeemed
text: Battlecry: For the rest of the game, after you summon a Silver Hand Recruit, give it Divine Shield.
flavorText: So infused with the Light, he has to wear double sleep masks at night.

name: Lotus Agents
text: Battlecry: Discover a Druid, Rogue, or Shaman card.
flavorText: Mostly, they stand around and look cool.

name: Lotus Agents
text: Battlecry: Discover a Druid, Rogue, or Shaman card.
flavorText: Mostly, they stand around and look cool.

name: Lotus Assassin
text: Stealth. Whenever this attacks and kills a minion, gain Stealth.
flavorText: For 5000g, you can just give the Jade Lotus any name and they will assassinate and/or embarrass them.

name: Lotus Bookie
text: Deathrattle: Get a Coin.
flavorText: He skims a bit from the top. It's just his nature.

name: Lotus Illusionist
text: After this minion attacks a hero, transform it into a random 6-Cost minion.
flavorText: If you think her Xavius and Sylvanas cosplay is great, wait till you see her Reno Jackson!

name: Love Everlasting
text: Your first spell each turn costs (2) less. Lasts until you don't play a spell on your turn.
flavorText: Poison Bloom was accused of plagiarizing the "Ooh, how long can this go on (ooh yeah)" hook from an old-school musical group called The Saronite Chain Gang.

name: Low Security Wing
text: Get a random Shaman minion. It's locked in your hand until you play another card.
flavorText: It's not that these prisoners don't matter, it's that the guards are a little preoccupied.

name: Lowly Squire
text: Inspire: Gain +1 Attack.
flavorText: But not the lowliest!

name: Lucentbark
text: Taunt Deathrattle: Go Dormant. Restore 5 Health to awaken this minion.
flavorText: Always feels refreshed after a little dirt nap.

name: Lucky Comet
text: Discover a Combo minion. The next one you play triggers its Combo twice.
flavorText: When you wish upon a star, your dreams will take you very far. When you wish upon a comet, your luck will make your opponent...

name: Luckydo Buccaneer
text: Battlecry: If your weapon has at least 3 Attack, gain +4/+4.
flavorText: You can't just leave a Luckydo somewhere. You gotta keep 'em with you! Especially in Gadgetzan!

name: Luckysoul Hoarder
text: Battlecry: Shuffle 2 Soul Fragments into your deck. Corrupt: Draw a card.
flavorText: Always brings his own reusable shopping bag, satchel, barrel, trunk, tray, and fluffy pillow.

name: Lumia
text: Lifesteal After a hero takes damage, they become Immune for the rest of the turn.
flavorText: "What's a world soul?" "Only the most sophisticated form of life ever protected by Titans. AND it's spherical! SPHERICAL!"

name: Luminous Geode
text: After a friendly minion is healed, give it +2 Attack.
flavorText: No take candle. BE CANDLE.

name: Luna's Pocket Galaxy
text: Change the Cost of minions in your deck to (1).
flavorText: Luna became head of the astronomy department when her boss invented the Pocket Black Hole.

name: Lunar Eclipse
text: Deal 3 damage to a minion. Your next spell this turn costs (2) less.
flavorText: When the Azeroth is between the Sun and the Moon.

name: Lunar Trailblazer
text: Battlecry: Set the Cost of a random spell in your hand to this minion's Cost.
flavorText: Changing legend into fact, she will ride into history.

name: Lunar Visions
text: Draw 2 cards. Minions drawn cost (2) less.
flavorText: The true mystery of lunar visions is how there is nothing to watch when there are so many channels.

name: Lunarwing Messenger
text: Lifesteal Battlecry: Imbue your Hero Power.
flavorText: Back in my day this is how we got friend requests.

name: Lurker
text: After a friendly minion attacks, deal 1 damage to a random enemy (or 2 if your minion is a Zerg).
flavorText: Never typed in chat. Subscribed for 40 months. The perfect viewer.

name: Lushwater Murcenary
text: Battlecry: If you control a Murloc, gain +1/+1.
flavorText: You can't just switch sides because they have more fish!

name: Lushwater Scout
text: After you summon a Murloc, give it +1 Attack and Rush.
flavorText: Only knows how to play "Careless Murgl" and "Mrgl Mrgl Little Star."

name: Lynessa Sunsorrow
text: Battlecry: Cast each spell you cast on your minions this game on this one.
flavorText: A diet of pure magic is great for the complexion but wreaks havoc on one's mood.

name: Lyra the Sunshard
text: Whenever you cast a spell, add a random Priest spell to your hand.
flavorText: Arise, fair sun, and kill my envious foes. They don't have a legendary as beautiful as you.

name: MC Blingtron
text: Battlecry: Both players equip 1/2 Microphones. Your opponent's increases all damage they take by 1!
flavorText: If this is the outcome of the robot uprising, then sign me up!

name: Mad Bomber
text: Battlecry: Deal 3 damage randomly split between all other characters.
flavorText: He's not really all that crazy, he is just not as careful with explosives as he should be.

name: Mad Bomber
text: Battlecry: Deal 3 damage randomly split between all other characters.
flavorText: He's not really all that crazy, he is just not as careful with explosives as he should be.

name: Mad Hatter
text: Battlecry: Randomly toss 3 hats to other minions. Each hat gives +1/+1.
flavorText: He's entirely bonkers. All the best goblins are.

name: Mad Scientist
text: Deathrattle: Put a Secret from your deck into the battlefield.
flavorText: His mother wanted him to be a mage or a warlock, but noooooooo, he had to go and be a scientist like his father.

name: Mad Summoner
text: Battlecry: Fill each player's board with 1/1 Imps.
flavorText: Does he summon because of his madness, or is he mad from all the summoning?

name: Madam Goya
text: Battlecry: Choose a friendly minion. Summon any copies of it in your deck.
flavorText: She has set up her Black Market here in Gadgetzan for one purpose, to make a KILLING when Beanie Babies make their inevitable comeback.

name: Madame Lazul
text: Battlecry: Discover a copy of a card in your opponent's hand.
flavorText: Of course she knows the future, she’s been looking at your cards the WHOLE TIME!

name: Madder Bomber
text: Battlecry: Deal 6 damage randomly split between all other characters.
flavorText: Dang, Bomber, calm down.

name: Maddest Bomber
text: Battlecry: Deal 12 damage randomly split among all other characters.
flavorText: Talk about a name that limits design space.

name: Maelstrom Portal
text: Deal 1 damage to all enemy minions. Summon a random 1-Cost minion.
flavorText: They bill this as a popular resort attraction, but they try and get your money up front.

name: Maestra of the Masquerade
text: You start the game as a different class until you play a Rogue card.
flavorText: She doesn't drop character until after the DVD commentary.

name: Maestra, Mask Merchant
text: Warlock Tourist Battlecry: Discover a Hero card from the past (from another class).
flavorText: Take a face, leave a face.

name: Maexxna
text: Poisonous
flavorText: Maexxna gets super mad when people introduce her as "Maxina" or "Maxxy".

name: Magatha, Bane of Music
text: Battlecry: Draw 5 cards. Give any spells drawn to your opponent.
flavorText: Not to be confused with that one other "-agatha" that likes when you play minions.

name: Magehunter
text: Rush Whenever this attacks a minion, Silence it.
flavorText: Hates waiting. Abhors chit chat. Fond of the color purple.

name: Magic Carpet
text: After you play a 1-Cost minion, give it +1 Attack and Rush.
flavorText: Its small yet fierce riders are affectionately known as rug rats.

name: Magic Dart Frog
text: After you cast a spell, deal 1 damage to a random enemy minion.
flavorText: There's a powerful throat in this frog.

name: Magic Trick
text: Discover a spell that costs (3) or less.
flavorText: The world is not ready for an illusion of this depth and intricacy!

name: Magical Dollhouse
text: Gain Spell Damage +1 this turn only.
flavorText: Build your own dollhouse in 3 easy steps! 1. Build a castle. 2. Miniaturize it. 3. GLITTER!

name: Magicfin
text: After a friendly Murloc dies, add a random Legendary minion to your hand.
flavorText: The best part is when he pulls Deathwing out of a top hat!

name: Magister Dawngrasp
text: Battlecry: Recast a spell from each spell school you've cast this game.
flavorText: Magister is a humble title for one who united warring armies against the greatest threat to Azeroth.

name: Magister's Apprentice
text: Your Arcane spells cost (1) less.
flavorText: "If this is the work I'll be doing, maybe I don't want to be just like you someday..."

name: Magma Hound
text: Rush. After this attacks a minion and survives, deal this minion's Attack damage split among all enemies.
flavorText: Don't say T.R.E.A.T. or he'll drool lava everywhere.

name: Magma Rager
flavorText: He likes to think he is powerful, but pretty much anyone can solo Molten Core now.

name: Magmaw
text: Colossal +99 Summon any leftover appendages when there is room. Colossal +99 Summon any leftover appendages when there is room. ( left!)
flavorText: Nefarius never cared much for his pet, but he saw there was room for improvements.

name: Magnataur Alpha
text: Also damages the minions next to whomever he attacks.
flavorText: Playing him also gets you into the Magnataur Beta.

name: Magnifying Glaive
text: After your hero attacks, draw until you have 3 cards.

flavorText: Ogres have really terrible short-term chocolate.

name: Ogre Magi
text: Spell Damage +1
flavorText: Training Ogres in the art of spellcasting is a questionable decision.

name: Ogre Ninja
text: Stealth 50% chance to attack the wrong enemy.
flavorText: He didn't have the grades to get into ninja school, but his dad pulled some strings.

name: Ogre Warmaul
text: 50% chance to attack the wrong enemy.
flavorText: Simple, misguided, and incredibly dangerous. You know, like most things ogre.

name: Ogre-Gang Ace
text: Rush Whenever this attacks, gain Divine Shield. (50% chance to gain Lifesteal instead.)
flavorText: 100% chance to not play by the rules.

name: Ogre-Gang Outlaw
text: Rush 50% chance to attack the wrong enemy.
flavorText: Why don't they just buy another hat?

name: Ogre-Gang Rider
text: Rush 50% chance to give your hero +3 Attack this turn instead of attacking.
flavorText: Doesn't know his ride from his left.

name: Ogremancer
text: Whenever your opponent casts a spell, summon a 2/2 Skeleton with Taunt.
flavorText: After their third attempt, Tharg began to suspect that Krul was summoning the skeletons on purpose.

name: Oh My Yogg!
text: Secret: When your opponent casts a spell, they instead cast a random one of the same Cost.
flavorText: Many wonders lie within, but they are not mere toys when your mind is their plaything.

name: Oh, Manager!
text: Deal 2 damage. Combo: Get a Coin.
flavorText: "I'd like to speak with your admiral."

name: Ohn'ahra
text: At the end of your turn, play the top 3 cards from your deck.
flavorText: Revered by the tauren and centaur, Ohn’ahra’s power over wind remains an inspiration to many.

name: Oil Rig Ambusher
text: Battlecry: Deal 2 damage. If this entered your hand this turn, deal 4 instead.
flavorText: Days since last accident: 0

name: Old Murk-Eye
text: Charge. Has +1 Attack for each other Murloc on the battlefield.
flavorText: He's a legend among murlocs. "Mrghllghghllghg!", they say.

name: Omega Agent
text: Battlecry: If you have 10 Mana Crystals, summon 2 copies of this minion.
flavorText: They don't just find the truth. They give it a ten second head start, then hunt it down.

name: Omega Assembly
text: Discover a Mech. If you have 10 Mana Crystals, keep all 3 instead.
flavorText: They told Dr. Boom he could only pick one. He disagreed.

name: Omega Defender
text: Taunt Battlecry: If you have 10 Mana Crystals, gain +10 Attack.
flavorText: "Surrender. You have 10 mana to comply."

name: Omega Devastator
text: Battlecry: If you have 10 Mana Crystals, deal 10 damage to a minion.
flavorText: The Alpha Devastator didn’t devastate enough. The Beta Devastator devastated too much. But the Omega was just right!

name: Omega Medic
text: Battlecry: If you have 10 Mana Crystals, restore 10 Health to your hero.
flavorText: She feels waiting for healing makes you appreciate it more.

name: Omega Mind
text: Battlecry: If you have 10 Mana Crystals, your spells have Lifesteal this turn.
flavorText: Has a side-business selling her lipstick shade, "Omega Red."

name: Omen
text: Rush, Windfury Deathrattle: Deal damage to all enemies. (Improves after this attacks!)
flavorText: His tremendous wisdom could not survive the foul influence of the demons’ fel magic during the War of the Ancients. But his blessing from Elune did.

name: Omen of the End
text: Battlecry: If your deck is empty, destroy the top 5 cards of the enemy deck.
flavorText: The prophecies foretold a terrible truth: that this match of Hearthstone would eventually end.

name: Ominous Nightmares
text: Choose One - Deal 1 damage to all minions; or Give a damaged minion +2/+2.
flavorText: Everyone keeps talking about nightmares, but I don't see any horses?

name: On the Hunt
text: Deal 1 damage. Summon a 1/1 Mastiff.
flavorText: The mastiff giggles if you don't hit any ducks.

name: Once Upon a Time...
text: Summon a random 3-Cost Beast, Dragon, Elemental, and Murloc.
flavorText: ...There was a humble little squirrel on a quest to defeat an evil dragon. With the help of its earthen friend, it saved the murloc princess from danger. The end.

name: One Hit Wonder
text: Rush Combo: Gain Poisonous.
flavorText: They're trying to get a second hit in with their next single, "Divine Shield".

name: One-eyed Cheat
text: Whenever you summon a Pirate, gain Stealth.
flavorText: When pirates say there is no "Eye" in "team," they are very literal about it.

name: Onyx Bishop
text: Battlecry: Summon a random friendly minion that died this game.
flavorText: B4 is a nice place to visit, but he wouldn't want to live there.

name: Onyx Bishop
text: Battlecry: Summon a random friendly minion that died this game.
flavorText: B4 is a nice place to visit, but he wouldn't want to live there.

name: Onyx Magescribe
text: Spellburst: Add 2 random spells from your class to your hand.
flavorText: Sometimes you gotta spend spells to earn spells.

name: Onyxia
text: Battlecry: Summon 1/1 Whelps until your side of the battlefield is full.
flavorText: Onyxia long manipulated the Stormwind Court by disguising herself as Lady Katrana Prestor. You would have thought that the giant wings and scales would have been a giveaway.

name: Onyxia the Broodmother
text: At the end of each turn, fill your board with 1/1 Whelps.
flavorText: Throw more dots, throw more dots, more dots, more dots!

name: Onyxian Drake
text: Taunt Battlecry: Deal damage equal to your Armor to an enemy minion.
flavorText: The best offense is a great defense.

name: Onyxian Warder
text: Battlecry: If you're holding a Dragon, summon two 2/1 Whelps with Rush.
flavorText: Throwing more whelps at the problem might not help, but they certainly will hurt.

name: Oondasta
text: Rush Overkill: Summon a Beast from your hand.
flavorText: Adorning devilsaurs with armor and feathers is a respected job in troll culture, although it has a high turnover rate.

name: Open the Cages
text: Secret: When your turn starts, if you control two minions, summon an Animal Companion.
flavorText: "Coming out of my cage, and I'm dead by turn nine..."

name: Open the Waygate
text: Quest: Cast 8 spells that didn't start in your deck. Reward: Time Warp.
flavorText: Although powerful, the incantation is simple. It’s just a jump to the left, and then a step to the right.

name: Opera Soloist
text: Battlecry: If you control no other minions, deal 3 damage to all enemy minions.
flavorText: It ain't over until the imp mother sings.

name: Optimistic Ogre
text: 50% chance to attack the correct enemy.
flavorText: "What if this goes wrong?" "But what if this goes right?"

name: Opu the Unseen
text: Stealth. Battlecry, Combo, and Deathrattle: Cast 'Fan of Knives'.
flavorText: This is allegedly what Opu looks like. We will confirm if we ever see him.

name: Oracle of Elune
text: After you play a minion that costs (2) or less, summon a copy of it.
flavorText: Even the moon goddess needs to back up her databases.

name: Orbital Halo
text: Give a minion +1/+1 and Divine Shield. Costs (0) if you played an adjacent card this turn.
flavorText: I can see your halo. HALO. Haaaalo.

name: Orbital Moon
text: Give a minion Taunt and Lifesteal. If you played an adjacent card this turn, also give it Reborn.
flavorText: The blood moon orbits once again.

name: Orbital Satellite
text: Discover a Draenei. If you played an adjacent card this turn, Discover another.
flavorText: Picks up all the buzz in space.

name: Order in the Court
text: Reorder your deck from highest Cost to lowest Cost. Draw a card.
flavorText: "I have nothing BUT contempt for this court!"

name: Orgrimmar Aspirant
text: Inspire: Give your weapon +1 Attack.
flavorText: "Four out of three orcs struggle with math." - Angry Zurge

name: Origami Crane
text: Taunt Battlecry: Swap Health with another minion.
flavorText: I was born with 1-Health and paper skin.

name: Origami Dragon
text: Divine Shield, Lifesteal Battlecry: Swap stats with another minion.
flavorText: The fire will give you a papercut, which CAN burn. Does that count?

name: Origami Frog
text: Rush Battlecry: Swap Attack with another minion.
flavorText: For extra-realistic fly-snatching action, use tape!

name: Orion, Mansion Manager
text: After a friendly Secret is revealed, cast a different Mage Secret and gain +2/+2.
flavorText: The secrets of the universe are vast... and will be revealed sometime later this game.

name: Ornery Direhorn
text: Taunt Battlecry: Adapt.
flavorText: "It's an herbivore. How dangerous can it be?" - Famous last words

name: Ornery Tortoise
text: Battlecry: Deal 5 damage to your hero.
flavorText: "Dude, where's my pizza?!"

name: Outfit Tailor
text: Battlecry: Give a friendly minion Attack and Health equal to this minion's.
flavorText: She has this terrible habit of eating melted cheese while on the job.

name: Outrider's Axe
text: After your hero attacks and kills a minion, draw a card.
flavorText: "I only have to get 4 Zhevra hooves? How hard could that be?"

name: Overconfident Orc
text: Taunt While at full Health, this has +2 Attack.
flavorText: "I am da powerful! You are da poop!"

name: Overdraft
text: Tradeable Unlock your Overloaded Mana Crystals to deal that much damage.
flavorText: Wait. It costs mana to be out of mana?!

name: Overflow
text: Restore 5 Health to all characters. Draw 5 cards.
flavorText: It's a high five followed by a low tide.

name: Overflow Surger
text: Battlecry: Summon a copy of this for each turn in a row you've played an Elemental. ( )
flavorText: The drip on this elemental is straight fire!

name: Overgrown Beanstalk
text: Summon a 2/2 Treant. Draw a card for each Treant you control.
flavorText: You'd need to be pretty jacked to climb this.

name: Overgrown Horror
text: Taunt Battlecry: Reduce the Cost of minions in your hand with Dark Gifts by (2).
flavorText: Fetch me the garden shears. The BIG shears.

name: Overgrowth
text: Gain two empty Mana Crystals.
flavorText: Zangarmarsh: it's a fungal out there!

name: Overheat
text: Give your minions +1/+1. Discard a random Nature spell to give them +1/+1 more.
flavorText: "Did you bring water?" "I THOUGHT YOU WERE BRINGING THE WATER!"

name: Overlord Drakuru
text: Rush, Windfury After this attacks and kills a minion, resurrect it on your side.
flavorText: Overlord: (1)

name: Overlord Runthak
text: Rush. Whenever this attacks, give +1/+1 to all minions in your hand.
flavorText: Knows how to lift everyone up while tearing every enemy down.

name: Overlord Saurfang
text: Battlecry: Resurrect 2 friendly Frenzy minions. Deal 1 damage to all other minions.
flavorText: Eats more than his fair share of sour candy.

name: Overlord's Whip
text: After you play a minion, deal 1 damage to it.
flavorText: "This merit badge is for cruelty. This one's for whipping. And this one is for embroidery..."

name: Overplanner
text: Battlecry: Choose three cards from your deck to put on top in that order.
flavorText: "Hey kids, what do you call an arrogant skydiving pirate? A condescending con descending!"

name: Overseer Frigidara
text: Battlecry: Draw 2 spells. If they're both Frost spells, deal 2 damage to all enemies.
flavorText: Is your refrigidarator running?

name: Overwhelm
text: Deal 2 damage to a minion. Deal one more damage for each Beast you control.
flavorText: Scholomance student Brewfest prank gone terribly, terribly awry.

name: Overzealous Healer
text: Deathrattle: Restore 6 Health to the enemy hero. Spellburst: Silence this minion.
flavorText: In another universe, she's Genji's best friend.

name: Owlonius
text: Spell Damage +1 Your spells get double bonus from Spell Damage.
flavorText: They said you sound like an owl.

name: Ozruk
text: Taunt Battlecry: Gain +5 Health for each Elemental you played last turn.
flavorText: Between you and me, Ozruk is a bit obsessed with his body.

name: Ozumat
text: Colossal +6 Deathrattle: For each of Ozumat's Tentacles, destroy a random enemy minion.
flavorText: Deathrattle: You'll be octo-sorry.

name: P1CK-P0K3T
text: Battlecry: If your deck has 25 or more cards, draw a card.
flavorText: P1ck-P0ck3t p1ck3d a p3ck 0f p1ckl3d p0ck3ts.

name: PMM Infinitizer
text: Battlecry: Set a friendly minion's Attack and Health to 8. It can't attack heroes this turn.
flavorText: Nobody knows what PMM stands for.

name: Pack Kodo
text: Battlecry: Discover a Beast, Secret, or weapon.
flavorText: He looks simple, but there’s a lot to unpack.

name: Pack Tactics
text: Secret: When a friendly minion is attacked, summon a 3/3 copy.
flavorText: "Just you wait, I’ll go get on my main!"

name: Pack the House
text: Summon a random 6, 5, 4, and 3-Cost minion. Overload: (2)
flavorText: How many Pack the Houses would a pack house if a pack could house Pack the House?

name: Package Dealer
text: After you draw a card, 50% chance to draw another.
flavorText: I'm always getting my neighbor's mail. And my other neighbor. And my other neighbor. I'm stealing their packages.

name: Package Runner
text: Can only attack if you have at least 8 cards in hand.
flavorText: He could go... all... the... way!

name: Painted Canvasaur
text: Battlecry: Give each other friendly Beast a random Bonus Effect.
flavorText: Oh this is a present? Would you like that gift raptor not?

name: Painter's Virtue
text: Lifesteal After your hero attacks, give minions in your hand +1/+1.
flavorText: For when the Light hits the painting at a certain angle.

name: Paleomancy
text: Discover an Undead. Spend 5 Corpses to keep all 3 instead.
flavorText: Death finds a way.

name: Palm Reading
text: Discover a spell. Reduce the Cost of spells in your hand by (1).
flavorText: Actual palms not required.

name: Paltry Flutterwing
text: Deathrattle: Summon a random 2-Cost minion that is Dormant for 2 turns.
flavorText: Beware! The Flutterwing Effect is even more dangerous.

name: Pandaren Importer
text: Battlecry: Discover a spell that didn't start in your deck.
flavorText: She carries everything you didn't want and more!

name: Panther Mask
text: Set a minion's stats to 5/4 and give it Stealth. Draw 2 cards.
flavorText: Every minion wants to be a cat.

name: Pantry Spider
text: Battlecry: Summon a 1/3 Spider.
flavorText: You have to admit, they make a cute couple.

name: Paparazzi
text: Battlecry: Discover a Legendary minion.
flavorText: When you're a Legendary minion, you get a shiny orange gem, a dragon emblem, and about 100 of these people following you everywhere.

name: Papercraft Angel
text: Your Hero Power costs (0).
flavorText: Warcraft. StarCraft. And now, Papercraft!

name: Parachute Brigand
text: After you play a Pirate, summon this minion from your hand.
flavorText: She flies standby.

name: Parade Leader
text: After you summon a Rush minion, give it +2 Attack.
flavorText: He's always going to reign on his parade.

name: Paraglide
text: Both players draw 3 cards. Outcast: Only you do.
flavorText: I can see my hand from here!!!!!

name: Paragon of Light
text: While this minion has 3 or more Attack, it has Taunt and Lifesteal.
flavorText: She’s all fun and games until someone rings that stupid bell.

name: Parallax Cannon
text: Has +2 Attack if you've Discovered this turn. Spellburst: Your hero is Immune this turn.
flavorText: Math is now cannon in the Warcraft universe.

name: Paralytic Poison
text: Give your weapon +1 Attack and "Your hero is Immune while attacking."
flavorText: The hammer is overkill.

name: Parched Desperado
text: Battlecry: If you've cast a spell while holding this, give your hero +3 Attack this turn.
flavorText: I'm green And I'm about to die Da ba dee da ba di

name: Park Panther
text: Rush. Whenever this attacks, give your hero +3 Attack this turn.
flavorText: Somebody called animal control once. It didn't work out very well for anybody.

name: Parrot Sanctuary
text: Your next Battlecry minion costs (1) less. After you play a Battlecry minion, reopen this.
flavorText: Did you know? It's very loud in a parrot sanctuary. This has been bird facts with Ranger Gilly.

name: Parrrley
text: Swap this for a card in your opponent's deck.
flavorText: Time to engage in some unfriendly negotiations.

name: Part Scrapper
text: Lose up to 5 Armor. Your next Mech costs that much less.
flavorText: "Goodbye! Goodbye! Goodbye!"

name: Partner Assignment
text: Add a random 2-Cost and 3-Cost Beast to your hand.
flavorText: In every group assignment, someone does all the legwork.

name: Partner in Crime
text: Battlecry: Summon a copy of this minion at the end of your turn.
flavorText: "You know what we need? Some rope." "That's stupid. Name one thing you'd need a rope for."

name: Party Animal
text: Battlecry: Give +1/+1 to each minion of a different type in your hand.
flavorText: He's the wildlife of the party!

name: Party Crasher
text: Battlecry: Choose an enemy minion. Throw a random minion from your hand at it.
flavorText: "Do you ever wonder why you don't get invited anywhere?" "… no, not really."

name: Party Favor Totem
text: At the end of your turn, summon a random basic Totem. Infuse ( ): Summon two instead.
flavorText: It's the gift (totem) that keeps on giving (totems)!

name: Party Fiend
text: Battlecry: Summon two 1/1 Felbeasts. Deal 3 damage to your hero.
flavorText: Arch-rival of the Boogiemonster.

name: Party Planner Vona
text: Battlecry: If you've taken 8 damage on your turns, summon Ourobos. ( left!) (Ready!)
flavorText: She's known for her popular "occult ritual to summon an otherworldly being" parties.

name: Party Up!
text: Summon five 2/2 Adventurers with random bonus effects.
flavorText: Random? But what if we don't get a tank?

name: Past Conflux
text: Summon a random Dragon that costs (5) or more. Advance to the present!
flavorText: For millennia, magic shrouded the Temporal Conflux and the rest of the Dragon Isles from all of Azeroth — even the dragonflights themselves.

name: Past Gnomeregan
text: Give a minion +2/+1. Advance to the present!
flavorText: Before the trogg invasion, Gnomeregan was a thriving, high-tech metropolis.

name: Past Silvermoon
text: Deal 5 damage to a random enemy minion. Advance to the present!
flavorText: For nearly seven thousand years, Silvermoon stood unblemished as the crown jewel of Quel'Thalas. But that was before the Lich King came.

name: Patches the Pilot
text: Battlecry: Shuffle six Parachutes into your deck that summon a 1/1 Pirate with Charge when drawn.
flavorText: Finally, a Patches you want to draw on turn 1!

name: Patches the Pirate
text: After you play a Pirate, summon this minion from your deck.
flavorText: What do sailors yell when Patches steals their treasure chest full of laws and other things being transported to parliament for a vote? "The Eyes have it!"

name: Patchwerk
text: Battlecry: Destroy a random minion in your opponent's hand, deck, and battlefield.
flavorText: This card is so good, it might need patch work.

name: Patchwork Pals
text: Get all 3 Animal Companions. They cost (1) less.
flavorText: "I'll name you Misha, you Huffer, and you can be the third one."

name: Pathmaker
text: Battlecry: Cast the other choice from the last Choose One spell you've cast. Battlecry:
flavorText: You can never choose the wrong path if you make your own.

name: Patient Assassin
text: Stealth Poisonous
flavorText: He’s not really that patient. It just takes a while for someone to walk by that he can actually reach.

name: Peaceful Piper
text: Choose One - Draw a Beast; or Discover one.
flavorText: "Is there anything worth more than peace and love on the planet Azeroth?"

name: Peasant
text: At the start of your turn, draw a card.
flavorText: Better pay them, or they'll join the Defias.

name: Pebbly Page
text: Battlecry: Draw an Overload card. You can't be Overloaded this turn.
flavorText: A good friend will lighten your Overload.

name: Pelagos
text: After you cast a spell on a friendly minion, set its Attack and Health to the higher of the two.
flavorText: He's a great judge of character.

name: Pelican Diver
text: Dormant for 1 turn. Rush
flavorText: The pelican’s beak is so big, some Colossal minions can even fit inside!* *This is a lie.

name: Pen Flinger
text: Battlecry: Deal 1 damage to a minion. Spellburst: Return this to your hand.
flavorText: The pen is also a more aerodynamic short-range projectile than the sword.

name: Penance
text: Lifesteal Deal 3 damage to a minion.
flavorText: This is what happens when you don’t give a sincere apology.

name: Pendant of Earth
text: Discover a minion from your deck. Restore Health to your hero equal to its Cost.
flavorText: Eaaaarrrrthhhhhh Pendaaaannnttttt Poweeerrrrrrrrrrr!!!!!!!!

name: Peon
text: Frenzy: Add a random spell from your class to your hand.
flavorText: Joke's on the peon: the job's never done.

name: Perdition's Blade
text: Battlecry: Deal 1 damage. Combo: Deal 2 instead.
flavorText: Perdition's Blade is Ragnaros's back-up weapon while Sulfuras is in the shop.

name: Perennial Serpent
text: Rush Costs (4) less if a minion is Dormant.
flavorText: Given the choice, I prefer the seasonal variety of giant serpent for my garden.

name: Perjury
text: Secret: When your turn starts, Discover and cast a Secret from another class.
flavorText: By Liar be Perjured!

name: Perpetual Flame
text: Deal 3 damage to a random enemy minion. If it dies, recast this. Overload: (1)
flavorText: Flame is perpetual.* *Perpetual only applies to current turn.

name: Perplexing Anomaly
text: Rush, Taunt, ...Stealth?
flavorText: I'm so confused... this is really a headscratcher... it doesn't make any sense... why does it cost 3 Mana?

name: Persistent Peddler
text: Tradeable Deathrattle: Summon a Persistent Peddler from your deck.
flavorText: Loves pyramid schemes and bike rides.

name: Pet Collector
text: Battlecry: Summon a Beast from your deck that costs (5) or less.
flavorText: "And I'll call you Mrs. Snugglepants, and you Bubblecuddle, and you Cutie Cakes, and you ..."

name: Pet Parrot
text: Battlecry: Repeat the last 1-Cost card you played.
flavorText: You are REQUIRED to give it crackers. It's the Bird Law.

name: Petal Peddler
text: At the end of your turn, give another random friendly Dragon +1/+1.
flavorText: The Emerald Nightmare might actually be a good thing for her business.

name: Petal Picker
text: Battlecry: If you've Imbued your Hero Power twice, draw 2 cards.
flavorText: She loves me... she loves me not...

name: Petrified Ogre
text: Starts Dormant. While Dormant, gain +2/+2 at the start of your turn. (50% chance to awaken instead.)
flavorText: First, he was afraid...

name: Petting Zoo
text: Summon a 3/3 Strider. Repeat for each Secret you control.
flavorText: Welcome to the petting zoo. DO NOT TOUCH THE ANIMALS.

name: Petty Theft
text: Get two random 1-Cost spells from other classes.
flavorText: Room service at a pirate hotel really cleans house.

name: Phalanx Commander
text: Your Taunt minions have +2 Attack.
flavorText: Turns out he's really good at herding cats.

name: Phantom Freebooter
text: Battlecry: Gain stats equal to your weapon's.
flavorText: There's no such thing as a free boot.

name: Phantom Militia
text: Echo Taunt
flavorText: Recruited from the Gilnean opera house.

name: Pharaoh Cat
text: Battlecry: Add a random Reborn minion to your hand.
flavorText: Mightiest of mousers, enduring in kingship of the upper and lower cat tree, conqueror of the red dot, the all-wise Catshepsut.

name: Pharaoh's Blessing
text: Give a minion +4/+4, Divine Shield, and Taunt.
flavorText: Life hack: Sneeze near a pharaoh.

name: Phase Stalker
text: After you use your Hero Power, cast a Secret from your deck.
flavorText: It's not just a phase! I don't have to tell you anything! GAWSH!

name: Photographer Fizzle
text: Battlecry: Take a Snapshot of your current hand and shuffle it into your deck. (Once per game)
flavorText: Look at this photograph.

name: Photon Cannon
text: Deal 3 damage. If this kills a minion, your Protoss minions cost (1) less this game.
flavorText: If this card were a minion, it would have Rush.

name: Photosynthesis
text: Restore 6 Health. Get 3 random Druid spells.
flavorText: Nothing beats some time relaxing in the sun with a pile of good mulch.

name: Pick Pocket
text: Echo Add a random card to your hand (from your opponent's class).
flavorText: He'll pick anyone's pocket, except a gnome's. He'd never stoop so low.

name: Picklock
text: All numbers on this card equal your remaining Mana. Battlecry: Deal damage to an enemy minion.
flavorText: Call me derivative because I'm always on curve!

name: Piercing Shot
text: Deal 6 damage to a minion. Excess damage hits the enemy hero.
flavorText: Goblins hate wasting money on unnecessary ammunition.

name: Piggyback Imp
text: Deathrattle: Summon a 4/1 Imp.
flavorText: Imp my ride.

name: Pile of Bones
text: Deathrattle: The next time you Excavate, resummon this.
flavorText: It's a very well-organized pile, I'll give you that.

name: Pilfer
text: Add a random card from another class to your hand.
flavorText: The class is always greener on the other side of the board.

name: Pilfered Power
text: Gain an empty Mana Crystal for each friendly minion.
flavorText: The Hozen don't get paid much, but at least they get to keep any excess mana.

name: Piloted Reaper
text: Deathrattle: Summon a random minion from your hand that costs (2) or less.
flavorText: New facial recognition systems keep out the Lorewalkers and Doomsayers.

name: Piloted Shredder
text: Deathrattle: Summon a random 2-Cost minion.
flavorText: Once upon a time, only goblins piloted shredders. These days, everyone from Doomsayer to Lorewalker Cho seems to ride one.

name: Piloted Sky Golem
text: Deathrattle: Summon a random 4-Cost minion.
flavorText: The pinnacle of goblin engineering. Includes an espresso machine and foot massager.

name: Pint-Size Potion
text: Give all enemy minions -3 Attack this turn only.
flavorText: I hope you didn't disenchant your Shadow Word: Horror!

name: Pint-Sized Summoner
text: The first minion you play each turn costs (1) less.
flavorText: She's quite jealous of the Gallon-Sized Summoner.

name: Pip the Potent
text: Battlecry: Copy each 1-Cost card in your hand.
flavorText: One time, I was trying to get Pip's attention to warn her that the dangerous outlaw Cheery Ollie, who also goes by just 'O', was headed her way. "Pip! Pip! Cheery O!", I shouted.

name: Pipsi Painthoof
text: Deathrattle: Summon a random Divine Shield, Rush, and Taunt minion from your deck.
flavorText: "Earthmother guide my paintbrush strokes, especially on the eyes."

name: Piranha Launcher
