name: Temple Enforcer
text: Battlecry: Give a friendly minion +3 Health.
flavorText: He also moonlights Thursday nights as a bouncer at the Pig and Whistle Tavern.

name: Temporal Construct
text: Battlecry: Deal 5 damage to an enemy minion. Draw cards equal to the excess damage.
flavorText: Time is a construct. Here it is.

name: Temporal Traveler
text: Deathrattle: Summon a 4/1 Shadow that attacks a random enemy minion.
flavorText: Note to past self: remember to avenge my imminent death.

name: Temporus
text: Battlecry: Your opponent takes two turns. Then you take two turns.
flavorText: Follows adventurers, seeking the ultimate time magic: the ability to reload.

name: Ten Gallon Hat
text: Draw a minion. Give it +1/+1 and "Deathrattle: Get a Ten Gallon Hat."
flavorText: It actually only holds three quarters of a gallon, but that doesn't sound as good.

name: Tenacious San'layn
text: Lifesteal Whenever this attacks, deal 2 damage to the enemy hero.
flavorText: Once bitten, twice healed.

name: Tending Dragonkin
text: Battlecry: Copy the lowest Cost Beast in your hand.
flavorText: Dogs are a dragon's best friend.

name: Tending Tauren
text: Choose One - Give your other minions +1/+1; or Summon two 2/2 Treants.
flavorText: That racial bonus to Herbalism finally paid off.

name: Tent Trasher
text: Rush. Costs (1) less for each friendly minion with a unique minion type.
flavorText: "I consider it redecorating."

name: Tentacle Grip
text: Deal 3 damage. Combo: Get a 1/1 Chaotic Tendril.
flavorText: "WINTER VEIL WAS MONTHS AGO, WHY ARE YOUR LIGHTS STILL UP?"

name: Tentacle Tender
text: At the end of your turn, get a 1/1 Chaotic Tendril.
flavorText: It's a messy job but somebody's got to do it. Well, actually, nobody should do this.

name: Tentacle of N'Zoth
text: Deathrattle: Deal 1 damage to all minions.
flavorText: Because EVERYDAY is the Day of the Tentacle of N'zoth.

name: Tentacled Menace
text: Battlecry: Each player draws a card. Swap their Costs.
flavorText: He calls this one the "Calamari Special."

name: Tentacles for Arms
text: Deathrattle: Return this to your hand.
flavorText: That's right. Garrosh just slapped you to death with a tentacle.

name: Tenwu of the Red Smoke
text: Battlecry: Return a friendly minion to your hand. It costs (1) this turn.
flavorText: Red, the color of subtlety.

name: Teron Gorefiend
text: Battlecry: Destroy all other friendly minions. Deathrattle: Resummon them with +1/+1.
flavorText: "You’re fine, friendly minions! You're fine! Don’t tell Mom!"

name: Terrible Chef
text: Battlecry: Summon a 0/2 Nerubian Egg. Deathrattle: Destroy it.
flavorText: Anyone can cook! But not them.

name: Terrorguard Escapee
text: Battlecry: Summon three 1/1 Huntresses for your opponent.
flavorText: Poor guy is terrified, look at his faces.

name: Terrorscale Stalker
text: Battlecry: Trigger a friendly minion's Deathrattle.
flavorText: Likes to scare his friends half to death.

name: Tess Greymane
text: Battlecry: Replay every card from another class you've played this game (targets chosen randomly).
flavorText: Those who cannot remember their card history are doomed to repeat it.

name: Test Subject
text: Deathrattle: Shuffle any spells you cast on this minion into your deck.
flavorText: “Now I feel... REALLY icky.”

name: Testing Dummy
text: Taunt Deathrattle: Deal 8 damage randomly split among all enemy minions.
flavorText: Don't worry, they're having a blast. MUAHAHAHAHAAAA!

name: Thaddius, Monstrosity
text: Taunt. Your odd-Cost cards cost (2) less. (Swaps polarity each turn!) Taunt. Your even-Cost cards cost (2) less. (Swaps polarity each turn!)
flavorText: Feugen is positive that Thaddius will see play, but Stalagg seems negative about it.

name: Thassarian
text: Reborn Battlecry and Deathrattle: Deal 2 damage to a random enemy.
flavorText: A natural born leader. And an unnatural reborn leader.

name: The 8 Hands From Beyond
text: Battlecry: Destroy both players' decks EXCEPT the 8 highest Cost cards in each.
flavorText: It was a one-eyed, eight-handed, giant purple planet eater.

name: The Amazing Reno
text: Battlecry: Make all minions disappear. *Poof!*
flavorText: "Reno!" "Please address me by my proper title." " Amazing Reno..."

name: The Arcanomicon
text: Get all 3 Leylines. Choose an upgrade for your Leylines.
flavorText: Pondering my Orb.

name: The Badlands Bandits
text: Get eight 3/2 Bandits with Bonus Effects. Any that can't fit in your hand are summoned instead.
flavorText: Bandits... ASSEMBLE!

name: The Beast
text: Deathrattle: Summon a 3/3 Pip Quickwit for your opponent.
flavorText: He lives in Blackrock Mountain. He eats Gnomes. That's pretty much it.

name: The Beast Within
text: Give a friendly Beast +1/+1, then it attacks a random enemy minion.
flavorText: Undoes years of obedience school training.

name: The Black Blood
text: Colossal +3. After you restore Health to a character, attack a random enemy minion.
flavorText: As cunning as she is hateful, Sinestra summoned the Black Blood from deep within the earth to mutate and empower her forces.

name: The Black Knight
text: Tradeable Battlecry: Destroy an enemy minion with Taunt.
flavorText: He was sent by the Lich King to disrupt the Argent Tournament. We can pretty much mark that a failure.

name: The Black Knight
text: Tradeable Battlecry: Destroy an enemy minion with Taunt.
flavorText: He was sent by the Lich King to disrupt the Argent Tournament. We can pretty much mark that a failure.

name: The Boogeymonster
text: Whenever this attacks and kills a minion, gain +2/+2.
flavorText: Has 20 years of training in classical ballet, but ALLLLLL he ever gets asked to do is boogie.

name: The Boom Reaver
text: Battlecry: Summon a copy of a minion in your deck. Give it Rush.
flavorText: “What’s better than reaving? BOOM reaving!”

name: The Boomship
text: Summon 3 random minions from your hand. Give them Rush.
flavorText: Dr. Boom ends his motivational speeches by dropping the mechs.

name: The Caverns Below
text: Quest: Play four minions with the same name. Reward: Crystal Core.
flavorText: Why can't it ever be The Taverns Below?

name: The Ceaseless Expanse
text: Costs (1) less for each time a card was drawn, played, or destroyed. Battlecry: Destroy all other minions.
flavorText: If you play this for its full Mana cost, you know what? You win. Good day sir!

name: The Countess
text: Battlecry: If your deck has no Neutral cards, add 3 Legendary Invitations to your hand.
flavorText: 3 Legendary Invitations, AH AH AH!

name: The Crystal Cove
text: The next minion you summon this turn has its stats set to 4/4.
flavorText: For some strange reason, everyone that hangs out at the Crystal Cove has the same name...

name: The Curator
text: Taunt Battlecry: Draw a Beast, Dragon, and Murloc.
flavorText: The Curator guards Azeroth’s deadliest creatures, but it’s secretly terrified of squirrels.

name: The Curator
text: Taunt Battlecry: Draw a Beast, Dragon, and Murloc.
flavorText: The Curator guards Azeroth’s deadliest creatures, but it’s secretly terrified of squirrels.

name: The Dark Portal
text: Draw a minion. If you have at least 8 cards in hand, it costs (5) less.
flavorText: Some say it's the source of Azeroth's greatest problems—aside from the gnomes.

name: The Darkness
text: Starts Dormant. Battlecry: Shuffle 3 Candles into the enemy deck. When drawn, this awakens.
flavorText: I would rather light a single candle than curse the darkness. But I'm willing to do both.

name: The Demon Seed
text: Questline: Take 12 damage on your turns. Reward: Lifesteal. Deal 3 damage to the enemy hero.
flavorText: Just need some elbow grease to get this working. Oh, and your soul.

name: The Egg of Khelos
text: Deathrattle: Summon a slightly cracked Egg. (Break 5 times to hatch a 20/20 Beast with Taunt!)
flavorText: Thousands upon thousands of years Khelos has been waiting to hatch. Hopefully you won't have to wait that long.

name: The Eternal Hold
text: Discover any Demon that costs (5) or more. If your deck has no minions, your next one costs (1).
flavorText: "...stay on the line, our customer service representative will speak with you soon..."

name: The Exodar
text: Battlecry: If you're building a Starship, launch it and choose a Protocol!
flavorText: Limitless potential! Boundless hope! Fourth rate space insurance.

name: The Fins Beyond Time
text: Battlecry: Replace your hand with your starting hand. Swap back at the end of your turn.
flavorText: Cards? Where we're going we don't need cards.

name: The Fires of Zin-Azshari
text: Replace your deck with minions that cost (5) or more. They cost (5).
flavorText: One heck of a hot tub.

name: The Fist of Ra-den
text: After you cast a spell, summon a Legendary minion of that Cost. Lose 1 Durability.
flavorText: The mighty Ra-den was known as the Keeper of Storms. Unfortunately, he could not keep his fist.

name: The Food Chain
text: Quest: Play a 1, 3, 5, and 7-Attack Beast. Reward: Shokk.
flavorText: Day 1. The search begins! I joined Elise Starseeker at the outskirts of the Crater, as well as a Tortollan named Umbra and a most curious gnome named Niri. Embarking into the jungle, we stumbled upon the largest tracks I’ve ever laid eyes on!

name: The Forbidden Sequence
text: Quest: Discover 7 cards. Reward: The Origin Stone.
flavorText: Day 9. We were not welcomed with open arms, but with spears! Fortunately, Chief Esho took pity on us and called off the guards. Learning of Elise's expertise, a Titanographer whisked her away to the library. Umbra disappeared in the twisting streets...

name: The Forest's Aid
text: Twinspell Summon five 2/2 Treants.
flavorText: Delicious Forest’s Aid! Made from real forests.

name: The Galactic Projection Orb
text: Recast a random spell of each Cost you've cast this game (targets enemies if possible).
flavorText: Look closely in the ball and you'll see the expansion of space and time itself. Or their projections, anyway.

name: The Garden's Grace
text: Give a minion +4/+4 and Divine Shield. Costs (1) less for each Mana you've spent on Holy spells this game.
flavorText: The perfect place to hold Conchella.

name: The Glass Knight
text: Divine Shield Whenever you restore Health, gain Divine Shield.
flavorText: She seems scary, but she's got a glass jaw.

name: The Gravitational Displacer
text: Starship Piece When this is launched, summon a copy of the Starship.
flavorText: You ever wonder why some planets have two moons?

name: The Great Dracorex
text: Rush After this attacks an enemy minion, it damages ALL other enemy minions.
flavorText: You were so preoccupied with whether or not you could, you didn't stop to think if you should.

name: The Harvester of Envy
text: After you play a card copied from the opponent, steal the original.
flavorText: "Ah, permission shmermission! You can borrow anything you want, anytime, as long as if you give it back before it's missed. Everyone knows that! Right?"

name: The Headless Horseman
text: Battlecry: Destroy the enemy minion with the most Attack! Shuffle my Head into your deck, you must get it back!
flavorText: This flavor text, you would expect to rhyme and reference, to great effect! It starts out strong, but as you can tell it doesn't end very good.

name: The Jailer
text: Battlecry: Destroy your deck. This minion gains Immune.
flavorText: At one point, The Jailer served as Arbiter over the souls of the Shadowlands. He was the epitome of an unbiased, righteous judge of character. WAS.

name: The Last Kaleidosaur
text: Quest: Cast 5 spells on your minions. Reward: Galvadon.
flavorText: “Impossible!” exclaimed the Silver Hand Recruit, his eyes filled with fear. Uther shook his head, turning the crystal until it caught the light: “Life finds a way.”

name: The Leviathan
text: Colossal +1 Rush, Divine Shield After this attacks, Dredge.
flavorText: Built by Ini Stormcoil, this massive vessel can withstand almost anything you put it through... although she would prefer you didn't!

name: The Lich King
text: Taunt At the end of your turn, add a random Lich King card to your hand.
flavorText: "All that I am: anger, cruelty, vengeance, 8 attack - I bestow upon you, my chosen knight."

name: The Light! It Burns!
text: Deal damage to a minion equal to its Attack.
flavorText: Wait, if you're over there, then who's messing with the lights?!

name: The Lobotomizer
text: Honorable Kill: Get a copy of the top card of your opponent's deck.
flavorText: This may hurt a little, but don't worry, you won't remember it.

name: The Lurker Below
text: Battlecry: Deal 3 damage to an enemy minion. If it dies, repeat on one of its neighbors.
flavorText: "Throw it back! THROW IT BACK!"

name: The Marsh Queen
text: Quest: Play seven 1-Cost minions. Reward: Queen Carnassa.
flavorText: Question: What's scarier, one giant angry dinosaur or 20 smaller vicious ones? Answer: AHHHHHHH THEY FOUND MEEEEEE

name: The Mistcaller
text: Battlecry: Give all minions in your hand and deck +1/+1.
flavorText: Calling the mist doesn't sound all that great. "Ooooh, it is slightly damp now!"

name: The Nameless One
text: Battlecry: Choose a minion. Become a 4/4 copy of it, then Silence it.
flavorText: Used to be called " , the Nameless," but everyone got confused.

name: The One-Amalgam Band
text: Battlecry: Gain a random Bonus Effect for each minion of a different type you've played this game. ( )
flavorText: Why be good with ONE instrument when you can be terrible with ALL of them!!!

name: The Primus
text: Titan After this uses an ability, Discover a card with that Rune.
flavorText: As there is a Pantheon of titans, so is there also a Pantheon of Death, comprised of powerful rulers in the Shadowlands.

name: The Purator
text: Taunt Battlecry: If your deck has no Neutral cards, draw a minion of each minion type.
flavorText: With the rise of the undead, the Curator sees it as his duty to take care of them.

name: The Rat King
text: Rush. Deathrattle: Go Dormant. Revive after 5 friendly minions die.
flavorText: "I'm the giant rat that makes all of da rules!"

name: The Replicator-inator
text: Miniaturize, Gigantify After you play a minion with the same Attack as this, summon a copy of it.
flavorText: Dr. Boom is the greatest inventor in the Tri-Zone area!

name: The Runespear
text: After your hero attacks, Discover a spell and cast it with random targets.
flavorText: When asked what the runes do, the tauren smith smiled: "A little of this, a little of that..."

name: The Ryecleaver
text: Battlecry and Deathrattle: Get a Slice of Bread. (Get 2 to Sandwich any minions in between!)
flavorText: Legend has it that this dreaded blade is be able to slice through even the most stale of sourdough baguettes.

name: The Scarab Lord
text: Battlecry: Summon a 0/1 Gong for your opponent. Combo: Gain Rush.
flavorText: What did it cost? 41,400 Silithid Carapace Fragments, to start.

name: The Scourge
text: Fill your board with random Undead.
flavorText: “You speak of justice? Of cowardice? I will show you the justice of the grave and the true meaning of fear.”

name: The Skeleton Key
text: Discover a spell, or refresh your options (20% chance to take 5 damage each refresh!)
flavorText: The skeleton belongs to the person who last tried to use it.

name: The Skeleton Knight
text: Deathrattle: Reveal a minion in each deck. If yours costs more, return this to your hand.
flavorText: Apparently it really was just a flesh wound.

name: The Soularium
text: Draw 3 cards. They are Temporary.
flavorText: Worst field trip ever.

name: The Stars Align
text: Transform minions in your hand into ones that cost (3) more. (They keep their original Cost.)
flavorText: Sweet, three Desert Obelisks!

name: The Stonewright
text: Battlecry: For the rest of the game, your Totems have +2 Attack.
flavorText: She wrights stone better than she reads it.

name: The Storm Bringer
text: Transform your minions into random Legendary minions.
flavorText: Finally, Electra can work from home.

name: The Sunwell
text: Fill your hand with random spells. Costs (1) less for each other card in your hand.
flavorText: The Lich King had extinguished the light of the Sunwell once before - it will take all the might Silvermoon can muster to defend it!

name: The Unseen Atlas
text: Draw 3 cards. Costs (1) less for each card in your hand.
flavorText: Are you sure? I can see it right there.

name: The Voraxx
text: After you cast a spell on this minion, summon a 1/1 Plant and cast another copy on it.
flavorText: I am the Voraxx. I speak for the weeds.

name: Theft Accusation
text: Choose a minion. Destroy it after you play a card copied from the opponent.
flavorText: Honey, where are my paaaaaaants?

name: Theldurin the Lost
text: Battlecry: If your deck started with no duplicates, gain Immune this turn and attack all enemies.
flavorText: He might be lost, but he knows where you can find these hands.

name: Theotar, the Mad Duke
text: Battlecry: Discover a card in each player's hand and swap them.
flavorText: "I'm afraid you've gone mad! You're entirely bonkers. But I'll tell you a secret. All the best souls are."

name: Therazane
text: Taunt Deathrattle: Double the stats of all Elementals in your hand and deck.
flavorText: You thought we forgot about her, didn't you? *nervous laughter*

name: Thickhide Kodo
text: Taunt Deathrattle: Gain 5 Armor.
flavorText: The introduction of professions was devastating for kodo populations.

name: Thing from Below
text: Taunt Costs (1) less for each Totem you've summoned this game.
flavorText: Just can't resist the opportunity to hang around with a bunch of totems.

name: Thirsty Drifter
text: Taunt Costs (1) less for each 1-Cost card you've played this game.
flavorText: Quick! Someone bring her a Manathirst card!

name: Thistle Tea
text: Draw a card. Add 2 extra copies of it to your hand.
flavorText: Aren't Thistles prickly? Why would you drink them? I don't get Rogues.

name: Thistle Tea Set
text: Discover a spell from another class. Get a copy of it.
flavorText: Available with Swiftthistle or Decafthistle.

name: Thor
text: Battlecry: Deal 5 damage. (Transforms if you launched a Starship this game.)
flavorText: "I need your clothes, your boots and your chitinous exoskeleton."

name: Thori'belore
text: Rush. Deathrattle: Go Dormant. Cast a Fire spell to revive Thori'belore!
flavorText: Mascot of QFC (Quel'Thelas Fried Chicken).

name: Thorignir Drake
text: Rush Whenever this attacks, summon two 3/1 Whelps to attack the target first.
flavorText: Throwing your children at enemies qualifies you for Worst Mother of the Year.

name: Thorim, Stormlord
text: Battlecry: Unlock your Overloaded Mana Crystals. Draw that many cards.
flavorText: In the mountains.

name: Thorngrowth Sentries
text: Summon two 1/2 Turtles with Taunt.
flavorText: Maybe we shouldn't drink from this Oasis…

name: Thornmantle Musician
text: Finale: The next Beast you summon gets +1/+1.
flavorText: She calls the hyena her "little chef". Not sure what that's about.

name: Thornveil Tentacle
text: Lifesteal Battlecry: Deal 2 damage to a random enemy minion.
flavorText: Jennifer dumped me.

name: Thoughtsteal
text: Copy 2 cards in your opponent's deck and add them to your hand.
flavorText: "What do you get when you cast Thoughtsteal on an Orc? Nothing!" - Tauren joke

name: Thrall's Gift
text: Discover a Temporary Lightning Storm, Hex, or Bloodlust.
flavorText: "I wrapped it myself!" -Thrall

name: Thrall, Deathseer
text: Battlecry: Transform your minions into random ones that cost (2) more.
flavorText: "Do not be afraid. Approach. The dead will sleep… for now."

name: Thrallmar Farseer
text: Windfury
flavorText: He's stationed in the Hellfire Peninsula, but he's hoping for a reassignment closer to Orgrimmar, or really anywhere the ground is less on fire.

name: Threads of Despair
text: Give all minions "Deathrattle: Deal 1 damage to all minions."
flavorText: Mom, I frew up...

name: Threshrider's Blessing
text: Give a friendly minion +4/+4 and "Deathrattle: Summon a random 4-Cost minion."
flavorText: Blessed

name: Thrive in the Shadows
text: Discover a spell from your deck.
flavorText: Why would your spells be afraid of the dark? It's easier to nap there.

name: Through Fel and Flames
text: Give a minion Rush. Finale: And +1/+1.
flavorText: It's a Fel spell, but also a FIRE spell.

name: Throw Glaive
text: Deal 2 damage to a minion. If it dies, add a Temporary copy of this to your hand.
flavorText: "No, no, I said SHOW me the glaive!"

name: Thunder Bluff Valiant
text: Battlecry and Inspire: Give your Totems +2 Attack.
flavorText: Allowing totems to attack is not cheating. I mean, there isn't anything in the rule books about it.

name: Thunder Bluff Valiant
text: Battlecry and Inspire: Give your Totems +2 Attack.
flavorText: Allowing totems to attack is not cheating. I mean, there isn't anything in the rule books about it.

name: Thunder Lizard
text: Battlecry: If you played an Elemental last turn, Adapt.
flavorText: What? THUNDER LIZARD is adapting!

name: Thunderbringer
text: Taunt Deathrattle: Summon an Elemental and Beast from your deck.
flavorText: You can lead a horse to water, but you can't stop it from electrocuting everything in the water.

name: Thunderhead
text: After you play a card with Overload, summon two 1/1 Sparks with Rush.
flavorText: Most of his friends are still Metalheads.

name: Thunderquake
text: Deal 1 damage to all minions. Get a Static Shock.
flavorText: Would you like to see my muscles? Catchphrase! Catchphrase! Hammer down!

name: Tichondrius
text: Your hero is Immune. Battlecry: Your next Demon this turn costs (0).
flavorText: Overseer of one of the inaugural realms.

name: Tickatus
text: Battlecry: Remove the top 5 cards from your deck. Corrupt: Your opponent's deck instead.
flavorText: "These are all.... EXPIRED!"

name: Ticket Master
text: Deathrattle: Shuffle 3 Tickets into your deck. When drawn, summon a 3/3 Plush Bear.
flavorText: You can exchange one ticket for a bear or save up thousands for a tacky light-up paperweight!

name: Ticket Scalper
text: Overkill: Draw 2 cards.
flavorText: Takes ten percent off the top.

name: Ticking Abomination
text: Deathrattle: Deal 5 damage to your minions.
flavorText: Abomination. Emphasis on the second syllable.

name: Ticking Timebomb
text: Deathrattle: Destroy a random enemy minion.
flavorText: Trust me, the timer always stops at 0 seconds.

name: Tidal Revenant
text: Battlecry: Deal 5 damage. Gain 8 Armor.
flavorText: A big minion that clears the board and gains Armor? Wow, Warrior is really in their element now.

name: Tidal Surge
text: Lifesteal Deal 5 damage to a minion.
flavorText: Also good for removing pesky stains.

name: Tidal Wave
text: Lifesteal Deal 3 damage to all minions.
flavorText: "Hang Four, mon!"

name: Tide Pools
text: Discover a spell that costs (3) or less. After you cast a spell, reopen this.
flavorText: I know they look delicious but do NOT eat them.

name: Tidelost Burrower
text: Battlecry: Dredge. If it's a Murloc, summon a 2/2 copy of it.
flavorText: Burrowing may not be for everyone, but I dig it.

name: Tidepool Pupil
text: Battlecry: If you've cast 3 spells while holding this, Discover one of them. ( left!) (Ready!)
flavorText: "Z-I-N A-S-H-A-R-Y!"

name: Tight-Lipped Witness
text: Secrets can't be revealed.
flavorText: People keep asking for her award-winning vegetarian chili recipe, but she just can't spill the beans.

name: Tigress Plushy
text: Miniaturize Rush, Lifesteal, Divine Shield
flavorText: The sheervalue of this card is undeniable.

name: Timber Tambourine
text: Deathrattle: Summon 5/5 (Ancient, Ancients). (Play cards that cost (5) or more while equipped to improve!)
flavorText: Timberine anyone? TIMBERINE!?

name: Timber Wolf
text: Your other Beasts have +1 Attack.
flavorText: Other beasts totally dig hanging out with timber wolves.

name: Time Adm'ral Hooktail
text: Battlecry: Summon a 0/8 Chest for your opponent. It's FULL of Coins!
flavorText: A pirate dragon's favorite workout? Treasure chest day.

name: Time Machine
text: Taunt Deathrattle: Get a random Rewind card.
flavorText: Doc, you made a time machine... out of a refrigerator?

name: Time Out!
text: Your hero is Immune until your next turn.
flavorText: Highly effective against 3 year olds.

name: Time Rip
text: Destroy a minion. Invoke Galakrond.
flavorText: "It's time. R.I.P."

name: Time Skipper
text: At the end of each player's turn, give them a Coin.
flavorText: Eh, I'm fast forwarding this century, I don't think anything interesting happens.

name: Time-Lost Glaive
text: Deathrattle: Get a random Demon from the past.
flavorText: Oh, that's when I left it!

name: Time-Lost Protodrake
text: Taunt When you draw this, add a random Dragon to your hand.
flavorText: Weird way to say "late" but ok.

name: Time-Lost Raptor
text: Echo Battlecry: Adapt your Time-Lost Raptors.
flavorText: Much of his time lost no-lifeing Diablo IV.

name: Time-Twisted Seer
text: Has Spell Damage +2 while damaged.
flavorText: They should really get some glasses for that.

name: Timeless Blessing
text: Give four random minions in your hand +4/+4, +3/+3, +2/+2, and +1/+1.
flavorText: To defeat the combined power of Murozond and C'Thun, Nozdormu would need heroes of Azeroth's past, present, and future.

name: Timeless Causality
text: Battlecry: Reverse the order of your deck.
flavorText: Never confuse Timeless Correlation with Timeless Causality.

name: Timeline Accelerator
text: Battlecry: Draw a Mech. It costs (2) less.
flavorText: The future is NOW! No wait, NOW!

name: Timelooper Toki
text: Battlecry: Get 3 random spells from the past. When you play ALL 3, get another Timelooper Toki.
flavorText: Well this loop's a wash. Let's meditate until the next one.

name: Timelord Nozdormu
text: Dormant for 5 turns. Rush. After you play a card from the newest expansion, awaken 1 turn sooner.
flavorText: We tried Dormant for 15 seconds, but that was a bit too quick.

name: Timestop
text: Deal 3 damage. Freeze two random enemy minions.
flavorText: A broken clock is right twice an eternity.

name: Timethief Rafaam
text: Fabled+. Your deck size is 40, but has 10 Rafaams! Battlecry: If you played the rest, destroy the enemy hero. ( left!) (Ready!)
flavorText: Timethief Rafaam has recruited himself from every universe to RULE ALL OF TIME! Murozond is just a temporary obstacle…

name: Timewarden
text: Battlecry: Until the end of your next turn, Dragons you summon gain Taunt and Divine Shield.
flavorText: When are we getting the Silver, Gold, and Diamond dragonflight?

name: Timeway Warden
text: Battlecry: Imprison an enemy minion. It goes Dormant for 10,000 turns. Deathrattle: Awaken it.
flavorText: You can get some turns reduced for good behavior.

name: Timewinder Zarimi

name: Toshley

text: Overload: (1)

name: Totem Golem
text: Overload: (1)

name: Toxmonger

text: Discover a card from your deck.

name: Tracking
text: Discover a card from your deck.

text: Stealth, Poisonous After your opponent plays a minion, attack it.

name: Travel Agent

name: Travel Security

name: Traveling Healer

flavorText: Never look a gift minion in the mouth.

name: Treasure Distributor

name: Treasure Guard
text: Taunt Deathrattle: Draw a card.

name: Tree of Life

name: Treenforcements

flavorText: Liquid cooled.

name: Trenchstalker

text: Summon copies of two Beasts in your deck that cost (3) or less.
flavorText: The defendants were found guilty on 33 counts of wiping raid parties.

name: Triangulate

name: Tribute Dance

name: Trick Totem
text: At the end of your turn, cast a random spell that costs (3) or less.

name: Tricksy Improviser

name: Tricky Satyr
text: Battlecry: Get a copy of the lowest Cost card in your opponent's hand.

name: Triennium Rex
text: Kindred and Deathrattle: Get a random Deathrattle minion. It costs (2) less.

name: Trinket Artist
text: Battlecry: Draw a Divine Shield minion and an Aura.

name: Trinket Tracker
text: Battlecry: Draw a 1-Cost spell.
flavorText: Dashing through the snow On an undead trinket craze Over the hills we go Tracking all the way!

name: Triple Sevens

name: Triplewick Trickster
text: Battlecry: Deal 2 damage to a random enemy, three times.
flavorText: You no take candle! Or second candle. You can take third candle though.

name: Trogg Beastrager
text: Battlecry: Give a random Beast in your hand +1/+1.

name: Trogg Exile
text: Rush Battlecry: Deal 4 damage to your hero.

name: Trogg Gemtosser
text: Finale: Deal 1 damage to a random enemy for each of your Mana Crystals.
flavorText: Oh no! You're throwing valuable gems at me! Please stop!

name: Trogg Gloomeater
text: Taunt Poisonous
flavorText: His breath smells like agony and despair, which is still better than most troggs.

name: Troggzor the Earthinator
text: Whenever your opponent casts a spell, summon a Burly Rockjaw Trogg.
flavorText: He keeps earthinating the countryside despite attempts to stop him.

name: Troll Batrider
text: Battlecry: Deal 3 damage to a random enemy minion.
flavorText: "Quiet! The bat can't hear where he's goin'!"

name: Troll Centurion
text: Rush. Honorable Kill: Deal 8 damage to the enemy hero.
flavorText: Centurion? Ha, come back when you’re a millennion.

name: Trolley Problem
text: Discard your lowest Cost spell. Summon two 3/3 Tram Cars with Rush. Quickdraw: Don't discard.
flavorText: If only there were thousands of hypotheticals to prepare me for this moment!

name: Troubled Double
text: Stealth Combo: Summon a copy of this.

artistName: L. Lullabi & I. Campelo da Silva
name: Troubled Mechanic
text: Divine Shield Spellburst: Draw a Draenei.
flavorText: In space, no one can hear you talk about your troubles.

name: Troublemaker
text: At the end of your turn, summon two 3/3 Ruffians that attack random enemies.
flavorText: "Prepare for trouble!" "Make it double!"

name: Trueaim Crescent

name: Truesilver Champion

flavorText: It Slices, it Dices. You can cut a tin can with it. (But you wouldn't want to.)

name: Trust Fall
text: Discover two minions that cost (5) or less. They gain each other's Attack and Health.

name: Tsunami

name: Tundra Rhino

name: Tunnel Blaster
text: Taunt Deathrattle: Deal 3 damage to all minions.

name: Tunnel Terror

name: Tunnel Trogg

name: Tunneling Geomancer
text: Prepare Spell Damage +1
flavorText: I SEES THE LIGHT! Oh wait it's just candle...

name: Turalyon, the Tenured
text: Rush. Whenever this attacks a minion, set the defender's Attack and Health to 3.
flavorText: "Let evil flee before righteousness; let the innocent live in peace. Let the day come when none need fear. For that day, I give my life gladly."

name: Turbulus
text: Hunter Tourist. Battlecry: Give +1/+1 to all other Battlecry minions in your hand, deck, and battlefield.
flavorText: "Passengers, we will be experiencing some minor Turbulus in the next few expansions."

name: Turn the Tides
text: Give your hero +3 Attack this turn. Summon a 3/3 Elemental with Rush. Overload: (1)

name: Tuskarr Fisherman
text: Battlecry: Give a friendly minion Spell Damage +1.
flavorText: If you bring him 500 fish, he'll give you this sweet Kalu'ak Fishing Pole.

name: Tuskarr Jouster
text: Battlecry: Reveal a minion in each deck. If yours costs more, restore 7 Health to your hero.
flavorText: Just could not be talked out of using his turtle for the joust...

name: Tuskarr Totemic
text: Battlecry: Summon a random basic Totem.
flavorText: Turns out the tuskarr aren't real choosy about their totems.

name: Tuskarr Totemic
text: Battlecry: Summon a random basic Totem.
flavorText: Turns out the tuskarr aren't real choosy about their totems.

name: Tuskarrrr Trawler
text: Battlecry: Dredge.
flavorText: "Fish scales? Junk. A gravestone? Junk. This weird looking puzzle box? Junk. AHA! An Ancharrr!"

name: Tuskpiercer
text: Deathrattle: Draw a Deathrattle minion.
flavorText: It's the Barrens, everything has tusks! The Quilboar have tusks, the boars have tusks, the tusks have tusks.

name: Twig of the World Tree

flavorText: For druids who want to branch out.

name: Twilight Acolyte
text: Battlecry: If you're holding a Dragon, swap this minion's Attack with another minion's.
flavorText: The dragons mostly keep him around as a snack.

name: Twilight Darkmender
text: Battlecry: If your C'Thun has at least 10 Attack, restore 10 Health to your hero.
flavorText: First she separates them from the lights, washes them in cold water, and hang-dries.

flavorText: Nothing unburdens your soul like a good ushing!

name: Vanish

name: Vast Wisdom

name: Vault Breaker
text: After you Discover a card, reduce its Cost by (1).

name: Vectus

name: Veiled Worshipper

name: Velen's Chosen

flavorText: Dr. Boom had one simple request: wasps with flippin' laser beams attached to their heads.

name: Weapons Attendant
text: Battlecry: If you control another Pirate, equip a random weapon from your deck.
flavorText: Hotel policy states that you must leave your weapons at the front desk. But GOOD NEWS! You can also buy weapons at the back desk!!

name: Weapons Expert
text: Battlecry: If you have a weapon equipped, give it +1/+1. Otherwise, draw a weapon.
flavorText: "Yes, Your Honor, this appears to be some sort of blade."

name: Weapons Project
text: Each player equips a 2/3 weapon and gains 6 Armor.
flavorText: Harrison Jones was kicked off this project.

name: Weasel Tunneler
text: Deathrattle: Shuffle this minion into your opponent's deck.
flavorText: He's the reason the First Bank of Gadgetzan has steel floors.

name: Weaver of the Cycle
text: Battlecry: If you're holding a spell that costs (5) or more, deal 3 damage.
flavorText: A terror at spin class.

name: Web of Deception
text: Return a friendly minion to your hand to summon a 4/4 Spider with Stealth.
flavorText: You sit on a web of LIES!

name: Webspinner
text: Deathrattle: Get a random Beast.
flavorText: Spider cocoons are like little piñatas!

name: Webweave
text: Summon two 1/2 Poisonous Spiders.
flavorText: O, what a tangled web we weave, hoping spiders dodge the cleave.

name: Wee Spellstopper
text: Adjacent minions have Elusive.
flavorText: Bane of spellcasters and spelling bees everywhere.

name: Weight of the World
text: Draw 2 cards. Forge: Draw cards until you have as many in hand as your opponent first.
flavorText: Unluckily for him, Azeroth has a tendency to get bigger every 2 years or so.

name: Welcome Home!
text: Reopen a location. Give it "Deathrattle: Summon a random 3-Cost minion."
flavorText: Kick off your boots, light the hearth, and deal a fresh hand!

name: Whack-A-Gnoll
text: Discover a Paladin weapon from the past. Give it +1/+1.
flavorText: Need closure on your Hardcore WoW character dying in Westfall? Step right up!

name: Whack-A-Gnoll Hammer
text: After your hero attacks, give a random friendly minion +1/+1.
flavorText: Hogger's most hated attraction.

name: Wheel of DEATH!!!
text: Destroy your deck. In 5 turns, destroy the enemy hero.
flavorText: Why don't the good guys ever get a wheel?

name: Whelp Bonker
text: Frenzy and Honorable Kill: Draw a card.
flavorText: Bonk!

name: Whelp Wrangler
text: At the end of your turn, get a 1/2 Whelp with Taunt.
flavorText: "Gosh darn it! How did these winged, airborne creatures manage to escape my knee-high, fenced enclosure AGAIN!?"

name: Whelp of the Bronze
text: Lifesteal Divine Shield
flavorText: What a cutie pie.

name: Whelp of the Infinite
text: Poisonous Reborn
flavorText: .eip eituc a tahW

name: Whetstone Hatchet
text: After your hero attacks, give a minion in your hand +1 Attack.
flavorText: A bad hatchet can make a good spear better.

name: Whirliglider
text: Battlecry: Summon a 0/2 Goblin Bomb.
flavorText: She's on a bomb voyage.

name: Whirling Combatant
text: Battlecry and Frenzy: Deal 1 damage to all other minions.
flavorText: It's called capoeira! And yes, it is dangerous!

name: Whirling Stormdrake
text: Rush, Windfury Kindred: Gain Immune this turn.
flavorText: Summons storms. Breathes fire. But first, does a sick loop-de-loop.

name: Whirling Zap-o-matic
text: Windfury
flavorText: If you pay a little extra, you can get it in "candy-apple red."

name: Whirlkick Master
text: Whenever you play a Combo card, add a random Combo card to your hand.
flavorText: C-c-combo!

name: Whirlpool
text: Destroy all minions and all copies of them (wherever they are).
flavorText: In the southern hemisphere, it actually summons all minions instead.

name: Whirlweaver
text: Battlecry: If you've cast a spell last turn, Discover an Elemental.
flavorText: Of all the creations from the Construct Quarter, a naga combined with water is the most intuitive.

name: Whirlwind
text: Deal 1 damage to ALL minions.
flavorText: The way to tell seasoned warriors from novice ones: the novices yell "wheeeee" while whirlwinding.

name: Whirlwind Tempest
text: Your minions with Windfury have Mega-Windfury.
flavorText: And your minions with mega-windfury get... dizzy.

name: Whispering Stone
text: Taunt Deathrattle: Get 2 random Fel spells. They cost Health instead of Mana.
flavorText: shhhhhh...

name: Whispers of EVIL
text: Add a Lackey to your hand.
flavorText: Madame Lazul’s ASMR program is off to a promising start!

name: Whispers of the Deep
text: Silence a friendly minion, then deal damage equal to its Attack randomly split among all enemy minions.
flavorText: And in the darkest of depths, the sailor heard a command from inside his own mind… “You will also buff my original card to 9 Mana.”

name: White Eyes
text: Taunt Deathrattle: Shuffle 'The Storm Guardian' into your deck.
flavorText: My life for Aya!

name: Whizbang the Wonderful
text: You start the game with one of Whizbang's Wonderful Decks!
flavorText: From the prestigious Westfall Wonderfuls.

name: Wicked Blightspawn
text: Reborn. Deathrattle: Equip a 1/2 Dagger. If you already have a weapon equipped, give it +2 Attack instead.
flavorText: We had to split this minion's Deathrattle into two parts.

name: Wicked Shipment
text: Tradeable Summon 1/1 (Imp, Imps). (Upgrades by 2 when Traded!)
flavorText: All horns on deck!

name: Wicked Skeleton
text: Battlecry: Gain +1/+1 for each minion that died this turn.
flavorText: It's minions like these that give normal, law-abiding skeletons a bad rap.

name: Wicked Stab (Rank 1)
text: Deal 2 damage. (Upgrades when you have 5 Mana.)
flavorText: Always go for the glowing weak point.

name: Wicked Whispers
text: Discard your lowest Cost card. Give your minions +1/+1.
flavorText: When the Old Ones whisper, others will scream.

name: Wicked Witchdoctor
text: Whenever you cast a spell, summon a random basic Totem.
flavorText: You can easily defeat her by either dealing 4 damage, or dropping a house on her.

name: Wicked Witchdoctor
text: Whenever you cast a spell, summon a random basic Totem.
flavorText: You can easily defeat her by either dealing 4 damage, or dropping a house on her.

name: Wickerclaw
text: After your hero gains Attack, this minion gains +2 Attack.
flavorText: They say pets tend to look like their owners.

name: Wickerfang
text: Colossal +4 After one of Wickerfang's Legs gains stats, this gains them too.
flavorText: In their time of need, Merithra of the Dream led the Timbermaw furbolgs in a ritual that animated the Felwood's oldest tree.

name: Wickerflame Burnbristle
text: Taunt Divine Shield Lifesteal
flavorText: Wickerflame spent years as a recruit for the Goons, never making the big-time because he always fired his chest-cannon too slowly. "Hey," he thought, "maybe if I keep my beard lit on fire, I can do this faster." BOOM, promoted.

name: Wickerflame Burnbristle
text: Taunt Divine Shield Lifesteal
flavorText: Wickerflame spent years as a recruit for the Goons, never making the big-time because he always fired his chest-cannon too slowly. "Hey," he thought, "maybe if I keep my beard lit on fire, I can do this faster." BOOM, promoted.

name: Widow's Bite
text: Give your hero +1 Attack this turn. Gain 1 Armor. Add "Widow's Feast" to your hand.
flavorText: Spider Bake Sale. All proceeds go to real spiders.

name: Widowbloom Seedsman
text: Battlecry: Draw a Nature spell. Gain an empty Mana Crystal.
flavorText: Sometimes a blue thumb is better than a green one.

name: Wild Bloodstinger
text: Battlecry: Summon a minion from your opponent's hand. Attack it.
flavorText: Tame Bloodstingers would politely invite your minion to tea.

name: Wild Growth
text: Gain an empty Mana Crystal.
flavorText: Grow your own mana crystals with this Mana Crystal Growth Kit, only 39.99!

name: Wild Pyromancer
text: After you cast a spell, deal 1 damage to ALL minions.
flavorText: BOOM BABY BOOM! BAD IS GOOD! DOWN WITH GOVERNMENT!

name: Wild Pyromancer
text: After you cast a spell, deal 1 damage to ALL minions.
flavorText: BOOM BABY BOOM! BAD IS GOOD! DOWN WITH GOVERNMENT!

name: Wild Spirits
text: Summon two different Dormant Wildseeds. Make your Wildseeds awaken 1 turn sooner.
flavorText: Wait, this card just released! It should be Standard Spirits!

name: Wilderness Pack
text: Add 5 random Beasts to your hand. They are Temporary.
flavorText: Don't bother asking, "Can we keep them?" The answer is no.

name: Wildfire
text: Your Hero Power deals 1 more damage this game.
flavorText: The Barrens were a lush jungle. Then this happened.

name: Wildheart Guff
text: Battlecry: Set your maximum Mana to 20. Gain an empty Mana Crystal. Draw a card.
flavorText: Guff faced his biggest challenge yet: making friends on a battlefield.

name: Wildpaw Cavern
text: At the end of your turn, summon a 3/4 Elemental that Freezes. Lasts 3 turns.
flavorText: Adventurers were quite confused when they saw how many boots were frozen to the ceiling.

name: Wildpaw Gnoll
text: Rush Costs (1) less for each non-Rogue Class card added to your hand this game.
flavorText: A big fan of four-claw discounts.

name: Wildwalker
text: Battlecry: Give a friendly Beast +3 Health.
flavorText: She was born to be something. She is just not quite sure what yet...

name: Wildwood Circle
text: Shatter. Summon two 2/2 Treants. Give your minions "Deathrattle: Summon a 2/2 Treant." Summon two 2/2 Treants. Give your minions "Deathrattle: Summon a 2/2 Treant."
flavorText: Let's circle back after we've played more cards.

name: Wilfred Fizzlebang
text: Cards you draw from your Hero Power cost (0).
flavorText: He can summon anything, even a FEARSOME DOOMGUARD*. *He's pretty sure this is going to work out.

name: Willful Watcher
text: Taunt Deathrattle: Destroy the top 3 cards of your deck.
flavorText: I still don't know why he has a sword. Despite being in many battles, he really just watches.

name: Wilted Shadow
text: Lifesteal Whenever you heal an enemy, this attacks it.
flavorText: The shadow shall burn you!

name: Wind-Up Enforcer
text: Tradeable Battlecry: Summon (copy, copies) of this minion. (Trade to upgrade!)
flavorText: Code 6404.5 clearly states that all Enforcers remain in their packaging until told by authorized personnel.

name: Wind-Up Musician
text: Tradeable Battlecry: Deal damage to all enemy minions. (Trade to upgrade!)
flavorText: Sure to wind up your opponents.

name: Wind-Up Sapling
text: Tradeable Battlecry: Refresh Mana (Crystal, Crystals). (Trade to upgrade!)
flavorText: I am Wind-Up Sapling.

name: Wind-up Burglebot
text: Whenever this attacks a minion and survives, draw a card.
flavorText: Don't blame the bot for his crimes... Blame whoever keeps winding him up!

name: Windchill
text: Freeze a minion. Draw a card.
flavorText: The thermometer says it’s 0° right now, but with the windchill it feels like -25°.

name: Windfury
text: Give a minion Windfury.
flavorText: Windfury is like Earthfury and Firefury, but more light and airy.

name: Windfury Harpy
text: Windfury
flavorText: Harpies are not pleasant sounding. That's the nicest I can put it.

name: Window Shopper
text: Miniaturize Battlecry: Discover a Demon. Set its stats and Cost to this minion's.
flavorText: OMG THAT'S LITERALLY ME!

name: Windpeak Wyrm
text: Battlecry: Deal 5 damage and gain 5 Armor. Kindred: Costs (3) less.
flavorText: He's so anxious. Always winds up in knots.

name: Windshear Stormcaller
text: Battlecry: If you control all 4 basic Totems, summon Al'Akir the Windlord.
flavorText: Don't ever doubt Al'Akir's love for basic totems.

name: Windspeaker
text: Battlecry: Give a friendly minion Windfury.
flavorText: Is there anything worse than a Windspeaker with halitosis?

name: Windswept Pageturner
text: After you summon an Elemental, deal 3 damage to a random enemy.
flavorText: This story will blow you away.

name: Wing Blast
text: Deal 4 damage to a minion. If a minion died this turn, this costs (1).
flavorText: Emeriss uses Wing Blast. It's super effective!

name: Wing Commander
text: Has +2 Attack for each Dragon in your hand.
flavorText: "Flap! Flap! FLAP!"

name: Wing Commander Ichman
text: Battlecry: Summon a Beast from your deck and give it Rush. If it kills a minion this turn, repeat.
flavorText: “Mulverick, it’s not your flying, it’s your faction.”

name: Wing Commander Mulverick
text: Rush. Your minions have "Honorable Kill: Summon a 2/2 Wyvern with Rush."
flavorText: “A board full of 2-Health minions? This is what I call a target rich environment.”

name: Wing Welding
text: Discard your highest Cost card. Deal damage equal to its Cost to all minions.
flavorText: This is not how you train your dragon.

name: Winged Aberration
text: Rush Combo: Overload for (2) to gain Immune this turn and Windfury.
flavorText: This bucket of chicken comes with an extra wing!

name: Winged Guardian
text: Taunt Reborn Elusive
flavorText: Take these broken wings, be reborn, and learn to fly again.

name: Wings of Eternity
text: Discover a Dragon from the past with a Dark Gift.
flavorText: I can't wait for Temporus with double Battlecry.

name: Wings of Hate (Rank 1)
text: Summon two 1/1 Felwings. (Upgrades when you have 5 Mana.)
flavorText: For one day each February, they become the Wings of Love.

name: Winterspring Whelp
text: Battlecry: Discover a 1-Cost spell from any class.
flavorText: It's important to explore other classes while learning to spread your wings!

name: Wisdom of Norgannon
text: Draw 2 cards. Costs (1) less for each different spell school you've cast this game.
flavorText: Now all we need is the power and courage of Norgannon.

name: Wish Upon a Star
text: Give +2/+3 to all minions in your hand, deck, and battlefield.
flavorText: "What are you going to wish for?" "I wish I had just a liiiiiiiittle more Attack and Health!" "...Really? You don't want, like, a million more?"

name: Wish of the New Moon
text: Deal 6 damage to a minion. (Cast (spell, spells) to gain Lifesteal.)
flavorText: Because wishing upon a star was soooo last expansion.

name: Wishing Well
text: After you play a Coin, get a random Legendary minion from another class and set its Cost to (1).
flavorText: Wishing upon a star? Pssshhh, that's so childish. Anyways, let me throw all my Coins into this well.

name: Wisp
flavorText: If you hit an Eredar Lord with enough Wisps, it will explode. But why?

name: Wispering Woods
text: Summon a 1/1 Wisp for each card in your hand.
flavorText: We didn't actually fire the guy who named Dark Wispers.

name: Wisprider
text: Battlecry: Imbue your Hero Power, then trigger it.
flavorText: "I surf dead people."

name: Wisps of the Old Gods
text: Choose One - Summon seven 1/1 Wisps; or Give your minions +2/+2.
flavorText: They're just normal wisps, actually. The "Of the Old Gods" bit is just marketing.

name: Witch of the Arch-Thief
text: Battlecry: Summon a 1/3 Voidwalker with Taunt. If your opponent has more minions, repeat.
flavorText: A minion fit for a king.

name: Witch's Apprentice
text: Taunt Battlecry: Add a random Shaman spell to your hand.
flavorText: Is she a frog that became a witch, or a witch that became a frog?

name: Witch's Apprentice
text: Taunt Battlecry: Add a random Shaman spell to your hand.
flavorText: Is she a frog that became a witch, or a witch that became a frog?

name: Witch's Brew
text: Restore 4 Health. Repeatable this turn.
flavorText: The swill has eyes!

name: Witch's Cauldron
text: After a friendly minion dies, add a random Shaman spell to your hand.
flavorText: Eye of murloc, ear of bat, foot of Fordring, fur of cat…

name: Witching Hour
text: Summon a random friendly Beast that died this game.
flavorText: The gates to the Gilnean pet cemetary MUST remain locked at all times.

name: Witchwood Apple
text: Add two 2/2 Treants to your hand.
flavorText: An apple a day keeps the worgen at bay.

name: Witchwood Grizzly
text: Taunt Battlecry: Lose 1 Health for each card in your opponent's hand.
flavorText: You know what they say about people with big hands? Small bears.

name: Witchwood Grizzly
text: Taunt Battlecry: Lose 1 Health for each card in your opponent's hand.
flavorText: You know what they say about people with big hands? Small bears.

name: Witchwood Imp
text: Stealth Deathrattle: Give a random friendly minion +2 Health.
flavorText: This wood imp. Stop asking!

name: Witchwood Piper
text: Battlecry: Draw the lowest Cost minion from your deck.
flavorText: She rids villages of annoying pests, like rats and children.

name: Wither
text: Choose a minion. Each friendly Undead steals 1 Attack and Health from it.
flavorText: The opponent's minion can't live wither without you.

name: Wizened Truthseeker
text: Battlecry: Set the Cost of every card in both player's hands back to their original Costs.
flavorText: All his stories start with "Back in my day..."

name: Wizened Wildspeaker
text: Taunt Battlecry: If you didn't play a minion last turn, refresh 3 Mana Crystals.
flavorText: He's not old, he's "Wizened".

name: Wobbling Runts
text: Deathrattle: Summon three 2/2 Runts.
flavorText: The fourth one fell off in a tragic accident. They don't talk about it.

name: Woecleaver
text: After your hero attacks, Recruit a minion.
flavorText: Turn that frown into TWO frowns!

name: Wolfrider
text: Charge
flavorText: Orcish raiders ride wolves because they are well adapted to harsh environments, and because they are soft and cuddly.

name: Wolpertinger
text: Battlecry: Summon a copy of this.
flavorText: Scholomance student Brewfest prank gone awry.

name: Woodcutter's Axe
text: Deathrattle: Give +2/+1 to a random friendly minion.
flavorText: It's a lumberjack's axe and that's ok.

name: Woodland Wonders
text: Summon two 2/5 Beetles with Taunt. Costs (3) less if you have Spell Damage.
flavorText: Is this a standup fight or another bug hunt?

name: Worgen Abomination
text: At the end of your turn, deal 2 damage to all other damaged minions.
flavorText: Does anyone want to play dead!?

name: Worgen Greaser
flavorText: Hair products are 79% of his monthly budget.

name: Worgen Greaser
flavorText: Hair products are 79% of his monthly budget.

name: Worgen Infiltrator
text: Stealth
flavorText: If you want to stop a worgen from infiltrating, just yell, "No! Bad boy!"

name: Worgen Infiltrator
text: Stealth
flavorText: If you want to stop a worgen from infiltrating, just yell, "No! Bad boy!"

name: Worgen Roadie
text: Battlecry: Summon a 0/3 Instrument Case for your opponent. (Break it for a random weapon!)
flavorText: "I asked for an instrument, and you give me a CURSED BLADE!?"

name: Workhorse
text: Deathrattle: Summon two 2/1 Ponies.
flavorText: Give me ONE reason why a horse shouldn’t be allowed in the travel agency.

name: Workshop Janitor
text: Battlecry: If you control a location, draw 2 cards.
flavorText: She works in a magical toy shop and they just gave her a regular mop? Make it make sense.

name: Workshop Mishap
text: Deal 5 damage to a minion. Excess damages both neighbors. Outcast: Gain Lifesteal.
flavorText: IT HAS BEEN DAYS SINCE LAST ACCIDENT.

name: Wormhole
text: Rewind Summon a random 3-Cost Beast. It attacks a random enemy.
flavorText: Worms sourced cruelty free from Gigantic Sam's Bait Shoppe.

name: Worthy Expedition
text: Discover a Choose One card.
flavorText: This isn't where I parked my mount.

name: Wound Prey
text: Deal 1 damage. Summon a 1/1 Hyena with Rush.
flavorText: You steal the cranberry juice, you pay the price.

name: Wound Prey
text: Deal 1 damage. Summon a 1/1 Hyena with Rush.
flavorText: You steal the cranberry juice, you pay the price.

name: Wrapped Golem
text: Reborn At the end of your turn, summon a 1/1 Scarab with Taunt.
flavorText: The end result of one of the greatest wrap battles of all time.

name: Wrath
text: Choose One - Deal 3 damage to a minion; or 1 damage and draw a card.
flavorText: The talk around the Ratchet Inn is that this card is too good and should be a Legendary.

name: Wrath
text: Choose One - Deal 3 damage to a minion; or 1 damage and draw a card.
flavorText: The talk around the Ratchet Inn is that this card is too good and should be a Legendary.

name: Wrathguard
text: Whenever this minion takes damage, also deal that amount to your hero.
flavorText: After playing against 5 Annoy-O-Trons, any normal guard will become a Wrathguard.

name: Wrathion
text: Taunt. Battlecry: Draw cards until you draw one that isn't a Dragon.
flavorText: Wrathion, son of Deathwing, is a dragon. Why isn't he tagged as a dragon, you ask? WHAT, ARE YOU TRYING TO BLOW HIS COVER??

name: Wrathscale Naga
text: After a friendly minion dies, deal 3 damage to a random enemy.
flavorText: If throwing glaives is what you crave; summon tokens and make 'em broken.

name: Wrathspike Brute
text: Taunt After this is attacked, deal 1 damage to all enemies.
flavorText: You scratch her back, her back scratches back.

name: Wrathspike Brute
text: Taunt After this is attacked, deal 1 damage to all enemies.
flavorText: You scratch her back, her back scratches back.

name: Wrathspine Enchanter
text: Battlecry: Cast a copy of a Fire, Frost, and Nature spell in your hand (targets chosen randomly).
flavorText: If he could see, he might be better at targeting.

name: Wreck'em and Deck'em
text: Choose a friendly Mech. Summon a copy of it that attacks a random enemy, then dies.
flavorText: ...and Check'em for any signs of life.

name: Wrenchcalibur
text: After your hero attacks, shuffle a Bomb into your opponent's deck.
flavorText: Whoso pulleth out this wrench from the toolbox is rightwise king of the lab.

name: Wretched Exile
text: After you play an Outcast card, add a random Outcast card to your hand.
flavorText: If you're cold, they're cold. Let your wretches inside.

name: Wretched Queen
text: Taunt Deathrattle: Summon two 4/6 Knights with Taunt.
flavorText: Mind your head when you're around her.

name: Wretched Reclaimer
text: Battlecry: Destroy a friendly minion, then return it to life with full Health.
flavorText: "Ok, here's the plan. We kill you, then bring you back." "Stronger?" "No, about the same."

name: Wretched Tiller
text: Whenever this minion attacks, deal 2 damage to the enemy hero.
flavorText: If you ever tried to plow permafrost, you’d be wretched, too.

name: Wretched Tutor
text: Spellburst: Deal 2 damage to all other minions.
flavorText: "If you like my tutoring, you'll love my sister the art therapist, my father the driver, and my mother the housekeeper."

name: Wriggling Horror
text: Battlecry: Give adjacent minions +1/+1.
flavorText: Created to scare. Born to wriggle.

name: Wyrm Weaver
text: Spellburst: Summon two 1/3 Mana Wyrms.
flavorText: Studied basket weaving as an undergrad.

name: Wyrmguard
text: Battlecry: If you're holding a Dragon, gain +1 Attack and Taunt.
flavorText: They think they're trusted guardians. Dragons think they're convenient snacks.

name: Wyrmrest Agent
text: Battlecry: If you're holding a Dragon, gain +1 Attack and Taunt.
flavorText: Keeping tabs on the Grand Tournament is priority 1 for the five mighty Dragonflights!

name: Wyrmrest Purifier
text: Battlecry: Transform all Neutral cards in your deck into random cards from your class.
flavorText: She keeps your deck classy.

name: Wyvern's Slumber
text: Choose One - Summon two Dormant Dreadseeds; or Deal 2 damage to all minions.
flavorText: But watch, as soon as you try to go to sleep it'll be running all around the house making a bunch of noise.

name: X-21 Repairbot
text: Deathrattle: Return any Mechs Magnetized to this to your hand.
flavorText: The circle bolt goes in the square hole.

name: XB-488 Disposalbot
text: Battlecry: Deal 5 damage randomly split among all enemy minions. Forge: Gain Lifesteal.
flavorText: You'll be so surprised when you figure out what XB stands for.

name: XB-931 Housekeeper
text: After you use a location, gain 3 Armor.
flavorText: "WHAT IS MY PURPOSE?" "You gain Armor." "OH GOD."

name: Xaril, Poisoned Mind
text: Battlecry and Deathrattle: Add a random Toxin card to your hand.
flavorText: It's basically your own fault if you go around drinking weird green potions handed out by creepy mantid dudes.

name: Xavius
text: After you play a card, summon a 2/1 Satyr.
flavorText: Xavius has grand nightmares of summoning Sargeras into this world, but a few Satyr will have to do for now.

name: Xhilag of the Abyss
text: Colossal +4 At the start of your turn, increase the damage of Xhilag's Stalks by 1.
flavorText: When ancient heroes drove a felhunter into the sea, they thought it was the end. But for Xhilag, it was only the beginning...

name: Xor'toth, Breaker of Stars
text: Battlecry: Add two Stars to both sides of your hand. When they collide, deal 5 damage to all enemies.
flavorText: We started his stats at 50,000,000,000/50,000,000,000 to be lore-accurate, but it was just a nudge too powerful.

name: Xyrella
text: Battlecry: If you've restored Health this turn, deal that much damage to all enemy minions.
flavorText: On the Night of Falling Stars, Xyrella had a vision of a shattered naaru. "Go to the Barrens," the being said. "Seek the shards of my broken body. Restore me, and I will restore your daughter."

name: Xyrella, the Devout
text: Battlecry: Trigger the Deathrattle of every friendly minion that died this game.
flavorText: Xyrella thought she was only saving her daughter. Her actions may very well have saved the entire world.

name: Y'Shaarj, Rage Unbound
text: At the end of your turn, put a minion from your deck into the battlefield.
flavorText: When he's working out, he binds all that rage back into a ponytail.

name: Y'Shaarj, the Defiler
text: Battlecry: Add a copy of each Corrupted card you've played this game to your hand. They cost (0) this turn.
flavorText: Y'Shaarj made an excellent office intern, doing the copying AND defiling.

name: Yamato Cannon
text: Starship Piece Battlecry: Destroy a random enemy minion. Also triggers on launch.
flavorText: Ya-may-to, Ya-mah-to

name: Yelling Yodeler
text: Battlecry: Trigger a friendly minion's Deathrattle twice.
flavorText: Maybe it's OK for the Grimtotem to destroy some music forever.

name: Yesterloc
